programme.title: Bloomberg TV+
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: Bloomberg Tech is the only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories. The program brings the audience interviews from the biggest names in the business...

programme.title: Bloomberg Deals
programme.desc: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the market. With a mix of original Bloomberg reporting, market data, guest analysis, and Bloomberg Intelligence.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: Ray Dalio : David Rubenstein talks with Bridgewater Associates founder Ray Dalio.

programme.title: Bloomberg Chief Future Officer
programme.desc: Gina Goetter, Hasbro : Gina Goetter is the CFO and COO of Hasbro; she's the architect of the company's transformation, while diversifying its manufacturing footprint and investing in Hasbro's video game ambitions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The Oil Kingpin Who Built A Shadow Empire : Journalists from all over the world present immersive coverage of relevant news stories; each story is extensively researched, and is recounted by acclaimed journalists as well as the people who are living the story.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Based in London, Francine Lacqua speaks with guests about global business, economics, finance and politics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Noble Outlaws : Earp's friend Ned Buntline comes to Tombstone hoping Earp will introduce him to the Clantons so he can use them in a new book.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Paymaster : Major Fletcher asks Earp to help transport a $15,000 payroll to the Army fort by way of a stagecoach with an interesting set of passengers.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Clayton's Family Row : The heat is on Earp from everyone when Curly Bill Brocius and Johnny Ringo threaten to shoot it out in Tombstone over a dead horse.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Perfidy of Shotgun Gibbs : Earp requests his old deputy to join him in Tombstone. On the way there, Shotgun is asked by the Clanton gang to vote ten times in the Tombstone election for the judge.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: You Can't Fight City Hall : Earp's crackdown on crime in Tombstone is causing big problems for the Clanton gang.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Behan Shows His Hand : Clum and others want Earp to take a posse after the men he was forced to release threaten him, but Earp declines.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Ring of Death : Fed up with Earp's interference, the head of the 10 Percent Ring in Tucson decides to kill Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt Wins One : Earp is summoned to Fort Huachuca where he is told Old Man Clanton has put a claim in for $7000 of beef stolen by the Apaches.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Fugitive : Earp arrests the son of a Mexican for murder before he crosses the border. Earp must get his prisoner back to Tombstone but a posse sent by Behan is after the same man.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Noble Outlaws : Earp's friend Ned Buntline comes to Tombstone hoping Earp will introduce him to the Clantons so he can use them in a new book.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Paymaster : Major Fletcher asks Earp to help transport a $15,000 payroll to the Army fort by way of a stagecoach with an interesting set of passengers.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Clayton's Family Row : The heat is on Earp from everyone when Curly Bill Brocius and Johnny Ringo threaten to shoot it out in Tombstone over a dead horse.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Matchmaker : Shotgun Gibbs decides that Earp and Nellie Cashman are made for each other and should get married. He sets up a dinner between them which in turn fuels rumors that reach the Clanton boys.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Get Shotgun Gibbs : The Ten Percent Ring wants retribution for the killing of Priddy.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wells Fargo Calling Marshal Earp : Wells Fargo asks Earp to help them solve the problem of silver ingots being stolen due to constant thefts on a 30-mile run.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A Murderer's Return : Convict Dobie Jenner arrives in Tombstone after being released from Yuma prison for murder. When his old mining partner George McKean sees him in town, he tells Earp to run Jenner out of town

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Big Fight at Total Wreck : Dick Gird has hired Irish and Welsh miners to work at the Total Wreck mine but the old country feud between the two nationalities creates constant fights.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Frontier Surgeon : During the holdup of a stage, gang leader Tinkham Brown is wounded. Earp wants Doc Goodfellow to tell Earp if the outlaws come after him but Doc Goodfellow refuses.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Let's Hang Curly Bill : Marshal Fred White tries to take the pistol from a drunk Curly Bill Brocius but White's actions cause the gun to fire and he is mortally wounded.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Silver Dollar : Earp rescues a new girl called Silver Dollar from an amorous man in front of the Alhambra where she works and takes her to Nellie Cashman for a new job.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Case of Senor Huerto : A boy and his mother from Mexico arrive in Tombstone asking Earp to turn over the body of his father who was murdered in Tombstone by a Mr. Granby.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Arizona Lottery : A string of murders occur at Tombstone caused by the Tucson Ten Percent Ring stealing the winning Arizona lottery tickets.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Don't Get Tough with a Sailor : Earp must contend with Capt. Rowland who runs his own legal system on his property -- including a jail.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Scout : An Army scout returns to Tombstone and finds his wife killed by the Apaches in retribution for his attacks on Apache renegades.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Buntline Special : Billy Clanton arrives home unexpectedly from school in San Antonio. Emma wants Old Man Clanton to send him back to school but Billy and his brothers Phin and Ike have other ideas.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: China Mary : With several hundred Chinese people in Tombstone, resentment brews among them about their treatment.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: His Life in His Hands : Earp has convinced Wells Fargo to use undercover agents to help protect shipments but the job is dangerous.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Behan's Double Game : Earp learns Old Man Clanton is moving some of his stolen silver. Earp catches two of the gang and some silver but Sheriff Behan releases the men saying they escaped.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Salvation of Emma Clanton : Old Man Clanton wants Emma to marry vicious outlaw Gringo Hawkby but Emma is against it. She turns to Nellie Cashman and Earp for help in persuading her father to change his mind.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: John Clum, Fighting Editor : Old Man Clanton gives Sheriff Behan orders to run John P. Clum out of town. Clanton is afraid important people might see Clum's paper and learn the truth.

programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: No Place To Hide : In Louisiana, a brutal killer turned a rural area into his personal hunting ground. He preyed on the defenseless, the weak and the elderly.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Business : Many escape the poverty of India to start new lives in the United States. One turned the American dream into a nightmare. People started turning up dead in New York's Indian community-authorities struggled to link fraud and murder to a powerful man.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Unabomber : For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Robin The Hood : In the southwest one serial bank robber claimed his loot went to the poor, but this thief was no folk hero. He had a gun and was willing to shoot.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Hidden Agenda : Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Broken Trust : Murder-for-hire is a complex crime. Solving it means finding the killer, and whoever paid for the hit. In South Carolina a death first ruled accidental was no accident, but that was just the beginning.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Caught in the Act : Surveillance video is often the most precise witness to a crime. After three brutal murders were caught on tape in Alabama, the suspects fled the area. They had an arsenal of stolen weapons, and swore they wouldn't be taken alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Predator : An Arizona girl's 1984 kidnapping leads the FBI on the trail of a key suspect.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Stranger : The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Crackdown : In the 1980s, the drug trade in New York City was a nightmare. Dealers made millions. Street violence was out of control. The NYPD battled the drug gangs only to become their target.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Human Prey : Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Home Invaders : Too often, convicted felons learn new techniques and find new partners in prison. In 1982, a group of former inmates began a spree of kidnapping and robbery.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Obsession : Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Influence : In the 1980's, thousands of violent criminals flooded into America from Cuba and Colombia. Drugs hit South Florida and the area bloated with illicit wealth became a violent powder keg.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Death in Alaska : The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Cruel Revenge : A kidnapping can shatter a family, bringing terror and heartache without warning. In 1984 with the flash of a gun, an ordinary business transaction became a violent abduction. In seconds, the son of a wealthy Miami developer was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Silent Strike : Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Marked For Death : Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Dead Men Do Talk : Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In The Line of Fire : Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lethal Dosage : Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seemfrom slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Patterns Of Guilt : The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Grave Discoveries : Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Death Grip : Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Seeds of Destruction : Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Invisible Death : Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Web of Clues : Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Dead In The Water : Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bodies of Evidence : It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Price of Murder : Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Coroner's Casebook : A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Coroner Investigator : CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fatal Error : Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lasting Impressions : No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: The Will : Cisco and Pancho come across Bob Drake being chased by two outlaws. After helping him, Cisco hears his story of being framed for a gold robbery. Cisco believes Bob and decides to investigate.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cattle Quarantine : Cisco and Pancho stumble across a ranch where the owner is arguing with a number of farm hands. It appears some of the cows have died from disease and the rest will need to be quarantined.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Renegade Son : Cisco and Pancho break a woman out of jail after she has been sentenced to hang for a murder she did not commit.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The Kovack Affair : Josh comes to the aid of his old friend Jesse, who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon owned by his beautiful girlfriend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Bounty for a Bride : A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Crossroads : Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Angels of Vengeance : A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Littlest Client : Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The Conquerors : A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Amos Carter : Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Montana Kid : To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The Healing Woman : Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The Matchmaker : Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Breakout : The government employs Randall to portray an escaped prisoner in order to trick his cellmate into leading authorities to the $50,000 he stole and stashed away in a secret location.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Estralita : Randall finds his prey in the hands of a lynch mob wiping out his bounty.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The Hostage : Who needs enemies with friends like the residents of Rogue City, who celebrate Randall for bringing in notorious killer Jumbo Kane.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The Empty Cell : Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Bad Gun : Against better judgment after losing a quick draw contest and bet, Josh serves as a guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman who comes west to retrieve and replace a defective gun he sold to notorious outlaw Curly Bill Brocius.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The Tyrant : On the trail of a Cavalry deserter and the horses he stole, Josh rides into a town ruled as the private fiefdom of its autocratic, psychopathic marshal who is holding the horses and deserter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Reckless : Hired by a father to bring back the man who killed his son Josh is surprised when he doesn't get paid because he brought the man back alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Desert Seed : Josh must bring a man back for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Twelve Hours to Crazy Horse : Josh brings a wanted man into the Mesa City Sheriff, only to find he killed the sheriff's brother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: No Trail Back : Josh is looking for a man who, while trying to rob a bank, is bitten by a rabid dog.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Man on Horseback : A man shoots his brother over ownership of their property and blames it on an Indian who reclaimed his horse the man found and stole.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Chain Gang : Josh is captured by a corrupt deputy and is forced by the sheriff to work on a chain gang in a gold mine.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Vanishing Act : Randall is tracking an escape artist who is forced to distract a town, letting three guys rob the bank.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Mental Lapse : Josh plays detective when he signs on to help an amnesiac discover his identity.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Angela : After watching her father stabbed to death, a grieving daughter wants immediate justice rather than wait for the slower-moving wheels of justice.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Batterball! : Molly and Gil see how delicious bubblecakes are made when they step into Chef Stef’s kitchen.The Guppies get their turn when they take the field to play batterball!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The New Year's Dragon! : The Guppies can’t wait for China’s Lunar New Year Festival, where they’ll operate a giant festival dragon in the grand parade!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Space Guppies! : When the evil robot Major Bummer tries to eliminate music from the galaxy, pop Princess Molly joins forces with sci-fi versions of the Guppies to restore peace, harmony, and melody!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Super Baby! : When supervillain Ms. Goo Goo starts changing everyone into babies, it’s up to Guppy Girl and Bubble Boy to stop her before they get turned into babies too!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Mighty, Untidy Titans : When some Untidy Titans (played by Guppies) start messing up Zooli, Nonny, and Oona's goat farm, the goat herders must journey to the Titans' cloud realm to ask them to tidy up.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Guppies Save Christmas! : On Christmas Eve, Molly, Gil, and Bubble Puppy discover Santa's lost list in the snow. But to return the list safely to the North Pole, they'll have to keep it out of the hands of the Christmas-hating Humbug!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: It's a Lizard! : When showman Gil’s “real live dragon” (actually a Komodo Dragon) gets loose in the small town of Bubbleville, it’s up to Pet Finders Oona and Zooli to track the lizard down and return it to its home on Komodo Island.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Swinging in the Rainforest! : City-slicker umbrella sellers Molly and Gil set up shop in the Amazon rainforest, but howler monkeys take all their merchandise! With the help of the other guppies, they use their knowledge of the Amazon to track down their umbrellas.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Alison in Wonderland! : Mail Carrier Molly is trying to deliver a Friendship Day card for someone named Alison in a place called Wonderland. But to do so, she’ll have to get past the card-stealing Queen of Hearts, who has banned Friendship Day across the land!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Taste Buddies! : When Chefs Molly and Gil bring their tasty food truck to Bland Land, they discover that the Baron von Bland only lets his subjects eat Bland Bread! Yuck! The Chefs must find a way to bring taste to the kingdom!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Fogzilla! : It’s Lighthouse Keeper Deema’s birthday! But when a monster named Fogzilla keeps blowing out her lighthouse, she needs to figure out how to get Captain Molly’s ship, carrying her birthday cake, to shore, or there won’t be a party!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Bigfoot Crossing! : On the hottest day of the year, it’s Park Rangers Goby and Gil’s job to make sure that pedestrians can make it safely to the lake to swim. But when Bigfoot swipes the park’s stop signs, will anyone be able to cross the road for a dip?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: A Load of Litterbugs! : On the U.S.S. Recycler, Captain Deema and her crew strive to leave every planet cleaner than they found it. But their mission is put to the test when a crew of messy Litterbugs, led by the evil Garbage Khan, take over their ship!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Something Fishy Going On! : Police Officers Molly and Gil are tracking some mysterious lights (aliens!?) that have been popping up around town. With the help of several nocturnal animal friends, they discover the lights aren’t aliens at all, they are anglerfish!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Race to the Oasis! : Ice Cream Sellers Molly and Gil are trying to deliver ice cream to a waterpark on the other side of a hot desert. Will they get the ice cream across the desert unmelted before the Rattlers--a rattlesnake biker gang--catch them?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Escape from Volcano Island! : Skipper Molly and First Mate Gil are shipwrecked on Volcano Island, and it’s about to erupt! But when parts of their boat start to mysteriously disappear, will they be able to make it off the island in time?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Bubble Puppysaurus! : When small-town “puppy-saurus,” Bubble Puppy, gets picked to go against the reigning champ Boom Boom T. Rex in the Tough Roarier competition, it’s a battle of strength, speed, and above all, heart.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Shimmer and Shine: The First Wish (Part 1) : Leah wins a genie bottle pendant at a carnival and is surprised to find that her prize comes with a bonus – genies Shimmer and Shine. Part 1.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Shimmer and Shine: The First Wish (Part 2) : Leah wins a genie bottle pendant at a carnival and is surprised to find that her prize comes with a bonus – genies Shimmer and Shine. Parte 2.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: The Sweetest Thing : When Leah wishes for help making cupcakes for a bake sale, she and the genies find themselves stuck with a giant birthday cake, some farm animals, and a river of cupcake batter. How will Leah finish without any wishes left?

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Dino Might! : After searching endlessly for Zac's missing dinosaur toy, Leah asks her genies to wish up a replacement and gets stuck with a real live Apatosaurus! Leah, Shimmer, and Shine have to figure out a way to fix this behemoth mistake.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Genie Treehouse : Leah and Zac try building a treehouse but find themselves in over their heads. Leah asks her genies for a treehouse and is thrown for a loop when Shimmer and Shine turn her house into a house of trees!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: What a Pig Mess : When Leah's party food accidentally gets run over by Zac, Leah needs to figure out what else to bring fast. Leah asks her genies for more Pigs in a Blanket, but the genies give her real pigs wrapped in a blanket!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Ahoy, Genies! : When Leah's bucket full of beach treasures floats into the vast ocean, Leah summons Shimmer and Shine to help her retrieve the loot.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Lights! Camera! Genies! : Leah and Zac are excited to watch their favorite movie, but Leah's popcorn burns and the movie won't play. Leah asks Shimmer and Shine for some movie magic help, but they accidentally wish the movie to life!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Backyard Ballet : Leah and Zac want to twirl, leap, and reenact their new favorite ballet, Swan Lake. Leah wishes to be a ballerina like the Swan Queen, but the genies mistakenly make her a queen of real swans!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Abraca-Genie : Leah notices Zac the Magician's magic tricks aren't going well, so she calls on her genies for some real magic assistance. But Shimmer and Shine aren't getting the tricks right either, and the girls have a magical mess to fix!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Santa's Little Genies : It's Christmas Eve, and Leah is transported to the North Pole! After Leah accidentally wishes Santa to a tropical island and the elves asleep, it's up to the girls to deliver the presents and save Christmas... genie-style!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Spaceship Wrecked : Astronauts Leah and Zac are on a quest to speak to an alien through their walkie talkies. When Leah wishes to be able to talk to one, Shimmer and Shine poof an alien into her backyard, where she can talk to one face to face!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: A Very Genie Halloweenie : It's Halloween, and Leah invites her genies over to join the fun. Leah makes a wish to make Zac's house look haunted, but the genies turn it into a real haunted house, with a real Frankenstein! It's a spooktacular adventure!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Sleep-Over Party : Leah has invited Shimmer and Shine over for a sleepover party, where they'll eat pizza, dance all night, and sleep in a pillow fort! But when all the party plans go awry, the genies help Leah out with some wish granting.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Game On : Leah and Zac have been saving for months to get the big prize at the arcade. When the ticket counting machine malfunctions and ruins all of their tickets, Leah calls on her genies for some arcade assistance!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: Gone Bowlin' : Leah and Zac are pumped for day of bowling! But Leah is having a tough time trying to knock down a single pin, so she calls on Shimmer and Shine to lend a little genie magic to improve her game.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A House Is Not A Home : Sam and Diane buy a house from a couple who have been there for forty years.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody For Hire Meets Norman Of The Apes : Robert Urich visits Cheers when Woody makes his television debut.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: To All The Girls I've Loved Before : Frasier second-guesses his wedding when the guys throw him a bachelor party.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Our Hourly Bread : Woody and Sam want a raise, but the bar's takings have been declining for three months.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Bar Wars : Sam and his Cheers gang have lost 173 sporting competitions to their rival, Gary and Gary's Old Town Tavern.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Big Kiss-Off : Sam and Woody make a bet that they can kiss Rebecca before midnight.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: How To Recede In Business : Lillian Corporation's new vice president fires Rebecca and rehires Sam as the bar's revival manager.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Swear to God : Sam vows to be abstinent when he finds out he may have fathered a child.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Executive Sweet : Sam traps Rebecca into declaring that she's in love with her boss.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: One Happy Chappy In A Snappy Serape : Rebecca pretends she's engaged to Sam when the bar owner proposes.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Those Lips, Those Ice : Carla becomes jealous when she thinks Eddie is having an affair with a skater.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm, Is That You : Norm discovers his hidden talent as a talented interior designer.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: How To Win Friends And Electrocute People : Cliff has appendicitis, but the gang are more interested in Frasier and Lilith's planned countrywide trip.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Jumping Jerks : After watching The Magnificent Seven, Woody, Cliff, and Norm decide to seek thrills.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Send In The Crane : Sam reunites with his lost love and ends up falling for her daughter!

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Bar Wars II: The Woodman Strikes Back : Sam and the Cheers gang lie, cheat and steal to win a drink-making contest.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Adventures In Housesitting : Rebecca panics when her boss's dog runs away while in her care.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Please, Mr. Postman : Cliff and his new co-worker fall for each other and put their jobs at risk.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: L'histoire de Scrotie McMorvoburnes : Après avoir lu le livre controversé de J.D. Salinger, 'L'Attrape-cœurs' Cartman, Kyle, Stan et Kenny se lancent à leur tour dans l'écriture d'un roman. Mais la mère de Stan découvre leur prose.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Medicinal Fried Chicken : Le restaurant préféré de Cartman a fermé et laissé place à une pharmacie qui vend du cannabis médicinal. Randy essaie alors désespérément d'obtenir une prescription médicale pour pouvoir s'en procurer.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Vous avez 0 amis : Cartman, Kyle, Stan et Kenny découvrent Facebook et les relations entre 'amis' virtuels. Malheureusement pour lui, Kyle accepte de devenir ami avec la mauvaise personne.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Ass Burgers : Stan continue d'avoir sa crise existentielle alors que Cartman intègre le monde du hamburger avec un ingrédient super spécial, top secret.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le dernier des mexicans : Un jeu de 'garde-frontières' termine mal et Butters finit par faire revivre la fierté mexicaine, mais Cartman n'est pas prêt à laisser le jeu se terminer ainsi.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Du chut à la bouche : Lorsque l'école primaire de South Park est victime d'un site internet dévoilant les secrets de tous, c'est l'hécatombe. Qui sauvera la situation? Cartman ou Gerbil King Lemmiwinks?

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Broadway Bro Down : Lorsque Randy apprend le secret qui se cache derrière la comédie musicale, il ne peut s'empêcher d'y emmener Sharon. Andrew Lloyd-Webber et Elton John le supplient de ne pas révéler leur secret.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 1% : Les parents de Kenny sont arrêtés et il est placé dans une famille, Cartman devient alors l'enfant le plus pauvre de l'école ! Entre-temps, une mystérieuse figure masquée ressurgit du passé.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: A History Channel Thanksgiving : Les parents de Kenny sont arrêtés et il est placé dans une famille, Cartman devient alors l'enfant le plus pauvre de l'école ! Entre-temps, une mystérieuse figure masquée ressurgit du passé.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: L'enfant pauvre : Les parents de Kenny sont arrêtés et il est placé dans une famille, Cartman devient alors l'enfant le plus pauvre de l'école ! Entre-temps, une mystérieuse figure masquée ressurgit du passé.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Couilles molles : Après la visite à l'école d'un intervenant venu expliquer les affres du harcèlement, Stan décide de réaliser un clip vidéo (sous forme de lip dub) pour sensibiliser le reste du monde.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Je n'aurais jamais dû faire de la tyrolienne : Cartman, Stan, Kyle et Kenny partent en excursion dans les Rocheuses du Colorado pour y découvrir la tyrolienne. Le voyage des enfants va rapidement virer au cauchemar.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: L'amour selon Cartman : L'arrivée d'une nouvelle camarade de classe de couleur va donner envie à Cartman de mettre en application ses conceptions personnelles sur l'amour et les races, en tentant de la faire tomber amoureuse du petit Token Black.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Sarcastaball : Randy Marsh change radicalement les règles du football à l'école élémentaire de South Park. Sa nouvelle version du jeu devient le sport le plus populaire du pays.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Toujours plus bas : Cartman prend conscience de son poids et décide de conduire un scooter pour handicapé. Kyle constate que de plus en plus de personnes mènent sans honte ce genre de vie autour de lui. C'est alors que Cartman se découvre une rivale.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Insécurité : Kyle pense que sa mère a une liaison avec un livreur UPS. Lorsque la méfiance du public tombe sur lui, la livraison de colis dans le quartier est menacée, et Eric Cartman achète un système de sécurité.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Hapa Loa de Butters : Quand Butters sort de l'école, ses parents se rendent compte qu'il est temps de lui dire pourquoi il n'est pas comme tous les autres enfants. Il doit se rendre dans un lieu étrange pour apprendre les voies de son peuple.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cauchemar sur FaceTime : Les préparatifs de Randy pour Halloween empêchent Stan de pouvoir aller à la chasse aux bonbons avec ses amis.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Un bracelet pour une cause : Ayant appris que Jésus s'était dopé pour accomplir ses miracles, le monde se sent perdu et trahi. Les garçons, joints par le reste de la nation, retirent les bracelets jaunes symbolisant leur ancienne idole.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Obama a gagné : Eric Cartman cache un terrible secret dans sa chambre à coucher qui pourrait changer les élections présidentielles 2012 aux États-unis.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Tête de nœud : Kyle est en colère contre Cartman qui a pris la mauvaise habitude de parler au téléphone avec le haut-parleur, et l'accuse de se mêler de sa vie privée. Cartman informe alors les autres élèves de l'école que le gouvernement les espionne.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Porno meurtre informatif : Peter Mullen informe ses camarades de classe que ses parents (entre autres !) regardent 'Informative Murder Porn', une émission susceptible de les inciter à s'entretuer. Les enfants décident donc de bloquer les chaines.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: World War Zimmerman : Depuis qu'il a appris que George Zimmerman n'était pas coupable du meurtre de Trayvon Martin, un jeune noir dans un quartier résidentiel aux Etats-Unis, Cartman est perturbé par une personne qu'il considère comme une menace pour l'humanité.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Les gothiques 3 : L'aurore des frimeurs : Henrietta, une des gothiques de l'école, est envoyée dans un camp pour enfants en difficulté. Elle en revient transformée en emo. En l'apercevant, les autres gothiques vont paniquer et demander de l'aide aux vampires.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Reluire la plotte : Monsieur Mackey annonce aux élèves de South Park que l'école est maintenant dotée d'un nouveau système informatique : "Intellilink". En essayant d'en faire une démonstration, il s'avère que celui-ci ne fonctionne pas comme prévu.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Black Friday : Les préparatifs de la plus grosse journée de shopping de l'année ont commencé. L'hiver approche et cela ne peut signifier qu'une seule chose : la lutte pour être le premier à entrer dans le centre commercial le fameux "Vendredi noir" est lancée.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Trône de fion : Le black friday approche, les armées des clans de Cartman et Kenny vont s'affronter dans un bain de sang, l'enjeu : les nouvelles consoles de jeu vidéo.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Tétons et dragons : Cet épisode est la bataille final entre les pro X-BOX one et PS4, les deux clans plmus que jamais divisés vont se battre jusqu'au bout pour défendre leur console préférée.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Hobbit : Les enfants de South Park découvre Photoshop et son pouvoir d'amélioration physique. Et Wendy va tout faire pour montrer aux garçons que ce n'est pas la vérité.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Va te faire financer : Afin de ne plus être obligés d'aller à l'école ou de faire quoi que ce soit, Stan, Kyle, Cartman, Kenny et Butters décident de créer leur startup en utilisant Kickstarter pour la financer.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Ébola sans gluten : M. Mackey agace tout le monde à propos de son régime alimentaire sans gluten. Après avoir été témoins des risques liés au gluten, les habitants changent radicalement leur comportement alimentaire.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Cissy : Dans le but d'utiliser les toilettes des filles pour échapper aux toilettes bondés des garçons, Cartman annonce qu'il est transgenre. Pendant ce temps, Randy se démène avec sa double identité de Lorde.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Handicar : Le nouveau service de transport de Timmy destiné à recueillir des fonds pour le camp d'été lui fait beaucoup d'ennemis.

programme.title: Idiotest

programme.desc: Mom Friends vs. Couple : Comedian Ben Gleib hosts as a mother of three and her best friend compete against a dating couple to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.desc: Turtles, Ties, and Toreadors : Rob feels very much the hero when he hires a maid for his overworked wife, Laura.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Sound of the Trumpets of Conscience Falls Deafly on a Brain That Holds Its Ears... : Rob struggles between his civic duty and fear for his family's safety when he believes he can identify the two robbers in a jewelry store holdup.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Scratch My Car and Die : A scratch on Rob's new car causes a domestic crisis at the Petrie house.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Return of Edwin Carp : Rob attempts to coax a legendary radio star out of retirement for a TV special.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: October Eve : An oil painting of Laura is being shown at an art gallery and although she posed fully clothed, the artist took the liberty of 'undraping' her.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail : Rob goes to see an old Army buddy's nightclub act and winds up spending the night in jail.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: My Neighbor's Husband's Other Life : Rob and Laura suspect their neighbor Jerry is having an affair after spotting him at a fancy restaurant with a pretty blonde.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All : Fearing he may be going bald, Rob tries a barber's secret recipe which consists of ingredients usually reserved for a salad.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Teacher's Petrie : Laura's new writing teacher, Mr. Caldwell, thinks she shows promise but Rob is skeptical of his intentions.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: My Mother Can Beat Up My Father : Laura proves herself more proficient than Rob in the art of self-defense.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Ghost of A. Chantz : Rob, Laura, Sally and Buddy spend a frightening night in a haunted cabin at a mountain resort.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Lady and the Baby Sitter : Rob and Laura are unaware that their teenage babysitter has a crush on Laura.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Hack Attack : A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of jobs. Forensic investigators had to determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error, or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Traffic Violations : The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dog Day Afternoon : A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dressed to Kill : After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: House Hunting : In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Needle in a Haystack : There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Wilson Murder : On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Family Interrupted : The gunman opened fire as the family of four entered their home, killing two and wounding the others. He'd pulled open a few drawers to make it look like a robbery, but the scene was clearly staged.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Where the Blood Drops : Susie Mowbray was charged in her husband's death. Her son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school, studied all of the evidence and, eventually, discovered the truth of what really happened between his parents.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Church Disappearance : In 1981, 6-year-old Cassie Hansen disappeared from her Minnesota church during an evening service. After receiving a tip that an older man was seen carrying a small person, police found Cassie's body in a dumpster.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Grounds for Indictment : A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Video Diary : When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Grave Evidence : While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Charred Remains : Shortly after daybreak, a fire is started in a dumpster in Vancouver. No one sees the arsonist or the fire, which burns for hours in the deserted parking lot. But there's more than garbage in this flaming container.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Raw Terror : After a weekend retreat, a Boy Scout's organs start shutting down, leaving doctors puzzled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dollars and Sense : On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Waste Mis-Management : Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just Desserts : The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts : In the series premiere of "Forensic Files", the longest-running true crime series in history, a Connecticut flight attendant goes missing. Police suspect her husband is guilty of murder, but can they prove it?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Home of the Brave : In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Small Town Terror : In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sign Here : A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Metal Business : Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Stake-Out : Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Killer Impression : In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Frozen Assets : In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nursery Crimes : An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Squire's Riches : Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Broken Promises : When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Visibility Zero : In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Garden of Evil : When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Order Up : A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fate Date : In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Murder in Las Vegas : Ron Rudin, a wealthy real-estate developer disappeared from his home in Las Vegas, Nev. Later, the charred remains of his decapitated body were found in the desert. After a lengthy investigation police were convinced that Rudin’s wife was involved.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Expert Witness : This report focuses on the use of expert witnesses in criminal trials and the problems that arise when their testimony is inaccurate or completely false.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A Time to Kill : 17-year-old Sterling Barber was accused of murdering Gerald Douglas Wyatt, a church deacon. The Carnesville, Georgia teenager claimed that he acted in self-defense because Wyatt, known to be a predator, was trying to molest him.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Searching for Secrets : In September 2005, 17-year-old Taylor Behl, a Virginia Commonwealth University freshman, disappeared from campus. A police investigation eventually uncovered her association with Ben Fawley, a 38-year-old man who confessed to having sex with Taylor.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: While Innocents Slept : A report based on the murder case involving the deaths of two infants which were originally attributed to SIDS (Sudden Infant Death Syndrome).

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: SolveThis Case: Who Killed Kay Wenal : Investigators ask for the public's help to solve the 2008 murder of Kay Wenal, a former model found dead in her home in Georgia.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Murder on the Cape : An a-list fashion writer leaves her fast-track career and becomes a single mom, but she also becomes the only murder victim in 30 years in her serene Cape Cod town

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Deadly Obsession : 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Krystal's Courage : 10-year-old Krystal Surles and her friend Kaylene Harris were attacked in Kaylene’s home by an intruder who slashed both girls’ throats. Kaylene died. Krystal not only survived but was able to help police, leading to the arrest of her attacker.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Moment of Truth : The investigation into the shooting death of retired NYPD officer Patrick Gilhuley, including interviews with jury members and a deconstruction of forensic evidence.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A Family's Shame : The broadcast presents accounts of people who suffer the reality that a close relative has committed murder and endure the struggle between family ties and civic responsibility.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Murder in the Mansion : In 1976, a gunman dressed in black murders two people and wounds two more in the Texas mansion belonging to one of the victims.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Who's My Baby's Father... My Husband, My Ex, Or His Nephew? : Krista isn't sure if the father of her baby is her husband, her ex-boyfriend or her ex's nephew! Then, Latasha is mad because her sister told her man that she slept with 4 other men, and he may not be the father of her baby!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Pre-Wedding Cheating Scandals! : Shenik and Shenequa were united on Maury’s show last year after a DNA test. But now is Shenik sleeping with her sister’s man? Plus, the only thing that stands in the way of these couples tying the knot are their lie detector test results!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Return of the Past Guests Part 1 : Josh will teach Danny a lesson about respecting women. Then, Nicole is here to confront her sister Jennifer once and for all!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Return of the Past Guests Part 2 : Jaycee shows Brandy that it’s never ok to cheat and ruin a family. Casi feels her fiancé could learn a lesson from past guest Kevin. Plus, we set viewer Tamara and guest Nathan up on a date.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sister Smackdown : Selena confesses that she's been sleeping with Jennifer's ex husband! Why did Jennifer sleep with her sister's man? Plus, Angela's boyfriend Pablo shares a dark secret!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bill wants his wife to move back in with him and his girlfriend. Then, Courtney confronts her fiancé about his mistress. Plus, Acquanette tells Mike it's her or his rap career!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bridezillas Attack! : Heather says that her fiancé Bud might cheating with her friend. Summer won't let the love of her life marry her cousin Kelly. Plus, Cherie is here to stop her daughter's wedding.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Singles And Ready To Mingle : Sheene’s got a secret to reveal to Derrick that may threaten their relationship. Tabitha thinks her man TJ might be cheating again. Plus, Xeo and James are going head to head for the same woman.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Catfights Over Dogs : Jessyca thinks that Shon and Mellisa may be having a secret relationship. Christine is here to tell her friend Chelsie that Carl isn't the faithful boyfriend she thinks he is. Plus, Char's man, June, gets revenge by having sex with Erin.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Married to the Drama : Janet says Philip cheated on her with a married woman and then walked out on her and their child! Philip claims he and Janet cannot agree on anything and he wants out! Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help these two see eye to eye?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Fists of Mablean : Terri claims Tom was an abusive freeloader who cheated on her and beat her constantly! Tom says he's a changed man and he only hit Terri in self-defense! Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help separate these two for good?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: You Got Everything! : Tyrell says he did everything he could to provide for his family but Aisha still had an affair. Aisha says she did nothing wrong and everything is his fault. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help these two reconnect, or is a divorce inevitable?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Dad in Error : Maryetta lied to Tyrone about the paternity of their baby. Tyrone says he cannot take the lies any longer and he wants a divorce. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help Tyrone escape Maryetta's web of lies?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: I Do to Divorce! : Domenique says it is over and she is ready to file for divorce. Eli says Domenique is the love of his life and he is not ready to let go. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help these two reconnect before it's too late?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Go Big or Go Louise : Tye says Louise is too controlling. Louise says she wants more than a divorce, she wants to take everything. Will Judge Mablean Ephriam rule in favor of Tye, Or will he be forced to give everything up?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Throw in the 27 Year Old Towel : Helen claims Wayne is a liar and a cheater. Wayne says Helen has a temper problem. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help these two reconcile, or will they call it quits after 27 years?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Call Me on The Burner Phone : Candi says Daryl would rather use a chat line than touch her. Daryl claims he loves Candi but she constantly nags him. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help these two resolve their issues?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Womanly Desires : Joanna claims Jim broke their vows and kept a dark secret from her. Jim says he has found his truth and wants to live his life as a woman. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help these two end their marriage amicably?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Fort Patrick : Rhonda says being with Patrick is more like being in a boot camp and not a marriage. Patrick says he is who he is and he is not going to change. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help Rhonda escape Patricks command?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Terrifying Duo! Meowban Brothers vs. Zoro! : In an effort to save Usopp’s village, the Straw Hat Pirates seek to block the marauders’ path from the sea. With Luffy out of the battle, Zoro must face the fearsome Meowban Brothers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy Back in Action! Miss Kaya's Desperate Resistance! : Nami manages to rescue Zoro’s missing swords and attempts to revive Luffy. With one of the Meowban brothers down, the other rages on even more fiercely than before!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Beat Kuro! Usopp the Man's Tearful Resolve! : Usopp’s friends run away with the heiress Kaya. Jango races off after them, but not before sending Butchie into a berserk rage. As Zoro continues his battle, Luffy takes on Captain Kuro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Epic Showdown! Swordsman Zoro vs. Acrobat Cabaji! : In the ongoing fight with Captain Buggy’s pirates, Zoro must face off with the Acrobat Cabaji while Luffy continues to do battle with the Pirate Clown himself.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Who is the Victor? Devil Fruit Power Showdown! : Luffy and the gang are on the run after the battle with Captain Buggy! With no place to go and nothing else to do, Nami finally agrees to join Luffy on his quest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Honorable Liar? Captain Usopp! : Luffy, Zoro, and Nami arrive at an island hoping to obtain a ship and crew, but the three are quickly confronted with the blustering Captain Usopp – who has a connection to Luffy’s past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Weirdest Guy Ever! Jango the Hypnotist! : Luffy follows Usopp to the mansion and encounters the brutal pirate Captain Kuro. The scoundrel plans to claim Kaya’s fortune and live the stolen life of luxury.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Expose the Plot! Pirate Butler, Captain Kuro! : Usopp spreads the word of Kuro’s evil plot and the impending pirate attack, but no one believes his warnings. The Straw Hat Pirates decide to help Usopp put a stop to the dastardly scheme.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Clash with the Black Cat Pirates! The Great Battle on the Slope! : Luffy and crew seek to best Captain Kuro, but they’ve prepared their defense on the wrong side of the island! All looks grim now that Usopp must face off against the Black Cat Pirates alone.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Terrifying Duo! Meowban Brothers vs. Zoro! : In an effort to save Usopp’s village, the Straw Hat Pirates seek to block the marauders’ path from the sea. With Luffy out of the battle, Zoro must face the fearsome Meowban Brothers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy Back in Action! Miss Kaya's Desperate Resistance! : Nami manages to rescue Zoro’s missing swords and attempts to revive Luffy. With one of the Meowban brothers down, the other rages on even more fiercely than before!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Beat Kuro! Usopp the Man's Tearful Resolve! : Usopp’s friends run away with the heiress Kaya. Jango races off after them, but not before sending Butchie into a berserk rage. As Zoro continues his battle, Luffy takes on Captain Kuro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Protect Kaya! The Usopp Pirates' Great Efforts! : Luffy battles with Kuro on the beach, while the Veggies (with Kaya in tow) flee Jango the Hypnotist.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Anger Explosion! Kuro vs. Luffy! How it Ends! : Kaya rewards the Straw Hat Pirates’ efforts to save her with a ship to call their own – the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: You're the Weird Creature! Gaimon and His Strange Friends! : On the legendary Treasure Island, Luffy and crew encounter strange animals and an even stranger man named Gaimon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Three-Sword Style's Past! Zoro and Kuina's Vow! : In the past, young Zoro sparred constantly with a girl named Kuina, but he could never claim victory. They vowed that one of them would someday be the world’s greatest swordsman – but tragedy intervened.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Famous Cook! Sanji of the Sea Restaurant! : The Straw Hats need a cook among their crew, so they head to a nearby restaurant and meet a passionate Sous Chef named Sanji.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Unwelcome Customer! Sanji's Food and Ghin's Debt! : Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry’s found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Strongest Pirate Fleet! Commodore Don Krieg! : The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Protect Baratie! The Great Pirate, Red Foot Zeff! : Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hawk-Eye Mihawk! The Great Swordsman Zoro Falls At Sea! : The Going Merry’s been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action’s not dead in the water – Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Deadly Foot Technique Bursts Forth! Sanji vs. The Invincible Pearl! : The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg’s pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren’t looking too good!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zeff and Sanji's Dream! The Illusory All Blue! : Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Cool-headed, Cold-hearted Demon! Pirate Fleet Chief Commander Ghin! : As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action, and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: I Won't Die! Fierce Battle, Luffy vs. Krieg! : The scoundrel Don Krieg appears to have the upper hand in his fight with Luffy. To avoid walking the plank, the rubber man must try a different strategy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Conclusion of the Deadly Battle! A Spear of Blind Determination! : The standoff between Luffy and Don Krieg takes a turn in favor of the Straw Hats when their captain focuses his onslaught on his opponent’s weaponry.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Set Sail! The Seafaring Cook Sets Off With Luffy! : With Don Krieg defeated, Luffy tries to convince Sanji to join up with the Straw Hats. The skilled cook is interested, but he has something to prove before moving on.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Worst Man in the Eastern Seas! Fishman Pirate Arlong! : With their culinary concerns in good hands, the Straw Hats set off in search of Nami – who’s on a collision course with a deadly foe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Witch of Cocoyashi Village! Arlong's Female Leader! : Zoro is captured by Fishman Arlong and learns a shocking secret about Nami. Unable to believe his ears, he puts the navigator to the ultimate test.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp Dead?! When is Luffy Going to Make Landfall?! : Luffy and his crew make their way towards Arlong Park and a showdown with its fishy proprietor. Along the way, they discover a treasure map that raises more questions about Nami.
