programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves the Crystal Kingdom : Dora Saves the Crystal Kingdom: Dora and Boots travel into a storybook to help their new friend Allie save the Crystal Kingdom. And they need your help! A Greedy King has taken all of the crystals that make the kingdom colorful.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves The Mermaids : Dora Saves The Mermaids: It's Clean-Up the Beach Day, as Dora and Boots are cleaning up garbage when they find a Singing Clam, who tells them the story of Mariana the Mermaid. Mariana lives in the Mermaid Kingdom at the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's World Adventure : Dora's World Adventure: All over the world, everyone's celebrating Friendship Day! But when Swiper mistakenly swipes all the special glowing Friendship Bracelets, Dora needs to team up with him to bring them back to the Friendship Parades.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Berry Hunt : Berry Hunt: Dora and Boots go hunting for blueberries on Blueberry Hill. But they'll have to be careful--Swiper the fox lives on Blueberry Hill!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: WizzleWishes : WizzleWishes: Dora and Boots meet Wizzle who lost his bag of wishes and can't get home. Our heroes, Dora and Boots, set off in search of the lost wishes.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Grandma's House: Dora and Boots set off to deliver a basket of treats to Dora's Abuela to help her cold. Dora's mother warns her to watch out for Swiper the Fox. He'll swipe the treats.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Surprise : Surprise: It's Boots' birthday! Dora tells him that all his friends are waiting at her house to give Boots a big party.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Sticky Tape : Sticky Tape: Benny the Bull needs some Sticky Tape in a hurry. His hot air balloon is leaking, and floating toward Crocodile Lake! Dora and Boots rush off to rescue their friend.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bouncing Ball : Bouncing Ball: Boots buys a super blue bouncy ball at the store, but it bounces off down the hill.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Backpack : Backpack: Dora remembers the first time she met her friend Backpack. Backpack is helping Dora carry her books back to the Library. Can they reach the Library before it closes?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bugga Bugga : Bugga Bugga: Dora and Boots offer to help Mama Bugga Bugga bring a giant cookie home to feed her babies.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Fish Out of Water : Fish Out of Water: Dora and Boots go on an underwater adventure that takes them all the way to the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Little Star : Little Star: Dora and Boots are getting ready to make a wish on the first star in the sky when the star falls! It's up to Dora and Boots to bring Little Star back home to the Moon.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves the Prince : Dora Saves the Prince: Dora and Boots must go into a storybook to rescue a prince from a wicked witch.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken : The Big Red Chicken: Dora and Boots read about a chicken that's as big as a house and set off on an educational adventure to meet him.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: El Coquí : El Coqui: In this version of the famous Puerto Rican legend, Dora and Boots find a sad, homesick little coqui who's lost his voice. Dora and Boots offer to take the frog home to his island.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Stuck Truck : Stuck Truck: Calling all trucks! Boots sure loves trucks. When Ice Cream Truck gets stuck in the muck at Play Park, Dora and Boots are off to the rescue. Boots uses his truck phone to call his other truck friends for help along the way.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Louder! : Louder!: What are we going to do? Cockledoodledoo! Dora and Boots help their friend, Red Rooster, get to the Highest Hill so he can wake up the Sun. Along the way we practice making lots of noise.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Roberto The Robot : Roberto The Robot: Dora and Boots meet Roberto, a very cool robot with a tool belt, flashing lights, stretching powers and super strength. But Roberto's lost!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Big Potato : The Big Potato: Benny the Bull finds a magic wand and turns himself into a potato by mistake. Oh no! It's up to Dora and Boots to bring their potato friend back to the Young Wizard so that he can change Benny back into a bull again.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Journey To The Purple Planet : Journey To The Purple Planet: Blast into outer space as Dora and Boots set off to bring stranded space creatures back home to the Purple Planet. Take a wild ride on a rocketship, travel through the Milky Way, and catch a ride on a comet.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Lost City : The Lost City: Where do toys go when they're lost? To the Lost City! But the Lost City is really hard to find. Dora and Boots are on an educational, Indiana Jones-like adventure as they race through the Number Pyramid and the Jumbled Jungle.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Meet Diego! : Meet Diego!: Meet Diego, Dora's super cool cousin. Diego works at the Animal Rescue Center. He can make animal noises and talk to wild animals!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Save The Puppies : Save The Puppies: Woof! Woof! Dora and Boots have a new video game called "Save the Puppies." A mean dogcatcher has locked up all the puppies in the Doggie Cages. To save them, Dora and Boots super jump into the video game.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: ¡Por Favor! : ¡Por Favor!: Dora and Boots read a fairy tale about a young kinkajou - a cute and cuddly forest creature - who is destined to be king. But the kinkajou loses his crown because he doesn't know the magic words, "por favor."

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Dino : Baby Dino: Dora, Boots and Diego need to bring a giant baby dinosaur home to his mommy at Dino Island. It's a prehistoric adventure through a land of dinosaurs. Tiptoe past a T-Rex, meet a Compsagnathus - the world's smallest dinosaur.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Boots' Special Day : Boots' Special Day: Today, Boots gets to do anything he wants, because it's his special day! Un día especial. Boots most favorite thing in the whole world is to visit his daddy at work.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: To The South Pole : To The South Pole: Rescue Truck arrives at Diego's Animal Center to deliver a cute, little animal that's really lost: a penguin! It's up to Dora, Boots and Diego to bring Pingüino all the way back home to the South Pole.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves The Game : Dora Saves The Game: Dora's cousin Daisy is playing in a big soccer game that's showing on TV. But Daisy's team is short a player. Daisy appeals to Dora to come play on her team and save the game. Run, Dora, run!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: What Happens Next? : What Happens Next?: What comes after "The End"? Dora and Boots are finishing a fairy tale, and reach the end of the story. They wonder what happens next.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Rescue, Rescue, Rescue : Rescue, Rescue, Rescue: Oh no! Three of our friends are in trouble. Baby Jaguar is stuck in a tree, Isa is stuck in a big sand hole, and Benny is stuck in his balloon on top of the Gooey Geyser. Who do we have to rescue first?

programme.title: Fire Masters

programme.title: Fire Masters

programme.title: Fire Masters

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jenny McCarthy, Lovebug: Grandma Dating App Edition, Drew-Gooder, Terence J : “The Masked Singer's” Jenny McCarthy chats. Grandma Joy picks a date for her granddaughter using a dating app. Meet Latrice McArthur, founder of the Wellness with Bella focused on healthy eating and meals for those in need. Terence J joins Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jason Biggs, Rita Ora, Dear Drew : "Cherries Wild" Host Jason Biggs stops by. Jason’s wife Jenny Mollen shares how to make an epic boxed lunch for your kids. Then, International pop sensation Rita Ora helps Drew whip up a cocktail in advance of National Margarita Day. Plus, a "Dear Drew."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Home Edit Co-Founders Clea Shearer and Joanna Teplin, Idina Menzel : It’s home edit hour! Drew enlists decluttering experts Clea Shearer & Joanna Teplin. Idina Menzel celebrates Women’s History Month. Drew teams up with interior designer Mikel Welch to surprise a deserving special education teacher with a bedroom makeover.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Carrie Underwood, 7-Year-Old Raises Money For Hospital, 3 Ways To Use Pantone’s Color of the Year : Music superstar Carrie Underwood chats. Meet 7-year-old Hayley Orlinsky who after hearing the frontline workers were running out of PPE decided to sell homemade bracelets to raising more than $27,000. Drew shares 3 ways to use Pantone’s color of the year.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Game Show Week! Dakota Johnson, Design By Drew: 4 Items Under $40 : Dakota Johnson joins Drew to chat and play a game of show-rades with an essential worker nurse. Meet The Yummy Brothers, four brothers under the age of 12 on a mission to turn their family cookie recipe into a booming business. Plus, a Design By Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: “Drew’s D-Cluttering” Show, Marie Kondo, Rachael Ray : It’s “Drew’s D-Cluttering” show! Drew is joined by tidying expert Marie Kondo who shares her tips for sparking joy. Then, Rachael Ray shares kitchen staples for a clutter-less kitchen. Plus, Drew surprises one single mom with a home office makeover.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Youtube Star David Dobrik, Comedian Fortune Feimster, Beauty Backgrounder : David Dobrik on amassing over 15 million YouTube subscribers and the Vlog Squad. Comedian Fortune Feimster stops by. in Beauty Backgrounder, Drew does a deep-dive into the history of iconic beauty looks and shares tips for perfecting the timeless look.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Celebrating the Oscars with Entertainment Tonight Co-Hosts Kevin Frazier & Nischelle Turner : Drew celebrates the Oscars with Ross Mathews and “Entertainment Tonight's” Kevin Frazier & Nischelle Turner who will be covering Oscars history, fashion, predictions, and more! Oscar nominee “Borat: Subsequent Moviefilm's” Maria Bakalova stops by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Joe Manganiello, Adam Sandler, Money Talk with Carmen Rita Wong : "Archenemy" star Joe Manganiello chats with Drew. Drew shares some never before seen moments from her chat with Adam Sandler. Personal finance expert Carmen Rita Wong shares tips. Drew tries out some weird food combos with TikTok star Eitan Bernath.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Camila Alves McConaughey & Kay McConaughey, Comedian Paul Scheer : Camila Alves McConaughey & Kay McConaughey discuss working together on Women of Today. Hometown Bar-B-Que Billy Durney smokes up turkey and sticky beef ribs. Drew surprises a deserving mom of 3-year-old quadruplets. Paul Scheer co-pilots "Drew’s News."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Milo Ventimiglia, Amy Sedaris, "Kids Book Club" with Jonah Featuring Cat Deeley, Wildflower : Milo Ventimiglia stops by. Amy Sedaris joins Drew for DIY crafting fun. Cat Deeley discusses her new book. Drew spotlights women who have paved their own way to success including a veteran who started an arts program for fellow veterans.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Exclusive: Dylan Farrow, Katherine Schwarzenegger Pratt, Cooking with Pilar and Sahra Nguyen : Drew sits down for an exclusive conversation with Dylan Farrow on her HBO Max docuseries “Allen vs. Farrow.” Katherine Schwarzenegger Pratt chats. Chef Pilar Valdes and founder of Nguyen Coffee Supply Sahra Nguyen share ways to use coffee in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Jennifer Love Hewitt, Drew Gooder: Bus Driving Principal : Star Jennifer Love Hewitt on growing up in showbiz, her friendship with Betty White and her aha moment with her daughter. Meet the Principal who added the role of bus driver to her duties to ensure all her students had a ride home during the pandemic.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Sarah Chalke, Roan Curtis, Brunch with Babs, Dear Drew with Heidi Gardner : “Eat Wheaties” star Sarah Chalke chats. "Firefly Lane” star Roan Curtis joins Drew and Sarah for Face The Fun Facts. Meet the grandma behind TikTok's Brunch with Babs, Barbara Costello, for breakfast casserole. “SNL's” Heidi Gardner joins “Dear Drew.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ricki Lake, Hyram Yarbo, Healthy Noodle Recipes : Ricki Lake shares her personal battle with hair loss over the last 30 years, her year of self-discovery and finding new love. Skincare expert Hyram Yarbo shares his number one skincare tip. Drew and Ross Matthews whip up healthy noodle recipes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Martha Stewart, Beauty In A Box, Dog Makeover with Jess Rona, The Weekender : Martha Stewart whips up a dish with Drew. Drew surprises a viewer who wants to ramp up her beauty routine for work Zooms. Comedian and dog groomer Jess Rona glams up a special pup. Drew gives a list of favorites in "The Weekender."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Time Management Hour, 5-Min Meals with Chef Rocco DiSpirito : It’s Drew’s time management hour! Time management expert Laura Vanderkam shares tips. A five-min meal with Chef Rocco DiSpirito. "The People’s Court" Judge Marilyn Milian and husband Judge John Schlesinger on balancing work and relationships effectively.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Joel McHale, Drew In Your Business, Steven Bartlett : Joel McHale stops by to chat. Drew helps entrepreneur Stephanie Davison take her business to the next level. Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by the founder of the disruptive global marketing agency The Social Chain Steven Bartlett in Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Seth MacFarlane & Liz Gillies, Drew’s Surprise For Family Who Adopted 5 Siblings, The Weekender : Seth MacFarlane and Liz Gillies on their new album. Drew surprises Andi & Thomas Bonura, parents of three, who adopted five siblings after hearing they were separated in different foster homes. Drew gives a list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Katherine Heigl, Cooking with Chef Lara lee, Hollywood Hair Stylist Jen Atkin, Terrence Terrell : “Firefly Lane” star Katherine Heigl chats. Chef Lara Lee teaches how to make Indonesian Fried Rice. Hair stylist Jen Atkin surprises some Drew-Gooder hairstylists. Plus, “B Positive” star Terrence Terrell joins Drew and Ross at the Drew’s News desk.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Skyjacked : Alex sends Walker and Trivette to go bring back a man who killed a ranger who was sent bring him in. Walker is sullen; it seems that the ranger who was killed was a friend of his and that Walker was the one who was suppose to bring the man in.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Long Haul : Cordell and Trivette go undercover to try and catch a bunch of big rig hijackers.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Rampage : Walker and Trivette track a group of brothers who are robbing and assaulting people across the county. The deeper into the back country they go, it gets more difficult for Walker and Trivette. Worried, CD goes to help.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Deadly Vision : Trivette leads the investigation when a little girl is kidnapped. The mother relies on a psychic so Trivette must work with the psychic. It seems the psychic does have the ability to sense things, and together they find the girl.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Rampage : Walker and Trivette track a group of brothers who are robbing and assaulting people across the county. The deeper into the back country they go, it gets more difficult for Walker and Trivette. Worried, CD goes to help.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Reunion: Part 1 : There's a reunion of former Texas Rangers and there's a shooting competition with cops from all over the country coming to take part in. An old friend of Alex's, a Senator who is rumored to be running for President is also in town.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Reunion: Part 2 : There's a reunion of former Texas Rangers and there's a shooting competition with cops from all over the country coming to take part in. An old friend of Alex's, a Senator who is rumored to be running for President is also in town.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Stolen Lullaby : Walker and Trivette attempt to take down an illegal adoption agency.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Badge of Honor : Walker and Trivette stop in a small town while transporting a likable prisoner. The sheriff rules the town with strict laws, harsh enforcement, and promotes racism with his deputies.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Branded : Rustlers are stealing cattle and selling them. A cattle inspector tracks the group down, but is killed when he tries to arrest them. Walker and Trivette pick up the investigation of the rustlers and find the one who killed the inspector.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Silk Dreams : A new designer drug is on the market and highly-priced for rich teenagers. When teens start dying after taking the Silk drug, the rangers must find the source and stop its spread.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Mustangs : A man contacts Alex about a problem but is killed before giving details. His last words are to save the horses. The rangers investigate the man's last days and find a plot to kill the wild mustangs on a range to make way for a development.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: 'Til Death Do Us Part : After a woman's car is forced off the road by a hit-and-run, Walker makes a daring rescue of her and her daughter. He is injured and falls into a coma in the hospital. Trivette and others search for the driver of the hit-and-run car.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Rainbow Warrior : An elderly Indian Chief dies. He learns that Chief Six Feathers was killed because he would not sign over his land for development. The chief's relative gets into trouble investigating the death. Walker and Trivette help.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Road to Black Bayou: Part 1 : Walker, Trivette, and CD take a vacation together. While there to fish, some men think they are there to find his drug operation. This places the rangers in danger as they are hunted down.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Road to Black Bayou: Part 2 : Walker, Trivette, and CD take a vacation together. While there to fish, some men think they are there to find his drug operation. This places the rangers in danger as they are hunted down.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Line of Fire : A policeman learns a few other policemen are stealing drugs from the evidence room in order to sell them. He is killed to keep him from telling Alex and Walker. The rangers investigate his death to find the dirty cops.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Payback : Car thieves are plaguing the city - they steal a specially adapted van used by a disabled boy. Walker is determined to find it for him. In the process of looking for it, Walker kills one of the thieves - a young boy whom Walker knows.

programme.desc: Housewarming : Ethel is jealous of Lucy's friendship with neighbor Betty Ramsey. Sensitive to this, Lucy decides that the three of them should have a nice lunch together. Although reticent at first, Ethel opens up to Betty upon hearing they are both from Albuquerque.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Building a Bar-B-Q : Lucy must get vacationing Ricky out of her hair so she can do her housework. She and Ethel trick their husbands into building a brick barbecue on the Ricardo patio by first pretending to build it themselves.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Country Club Dance : The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Raises Tulips : Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos Dedicate A Statue : The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky's School Pageant : The Ricardos and the Mertzes are cast in Little Ricky's school play when it runs short of cast members. Ricky plays a hollow tree, Lucy is the wicked witch, Fred plays the friendly frog, and Ethel is transformed in to the fairy princess.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and The Loving Cup : Ricky insults Lucy's taste in hats so, as a joke, Lucy puts a loving cap trophy on her head that Ricky plans to present to champion jockey Johnny Longden at a National Turf Association dinner later that night. The trophy gets stuck on Lucy's head.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Superman : Little Ricky is turning 5 years old and Lucy had a party planned for Saturday, but Caroline Appleby is throwing a birthday party for her son Stevie on the same day. Neither mother is willing to change the date of their party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky Gets A Dog : Lucy and Ricky are determined to get rid of the puppy their son has brought home. They have a hard time overcoming Little Ricky’s arguments that it’s a welcome addition to a home that already boasts a parakeet, a frog, a lizard, a turtle and a goldfish.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Wants To Move To The Country : Lucy has become tired of living in the city and drops some none-too-subtle hints to Ricky that it would be nice to move to the country. Unbeknownst to her Ricky has already placed a comfortable deposit on a house in Westport, Connecticutt.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Hates To Leave : The Ricardos are anxious about their move to the country. Reality really sets in when Fred shows their apartment to a young couple. The Taylors will take the apartment but need to move in immediately.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Misses The Mertzes : The Ricardos get settled in their country home after all those years in a New York apartment and immediately begin to miss their old friends, Fred and Ethel. Lucy and Ricky decide to surprise the Mertzes with a visit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Gets Chummy With The Neighbors : Wanting to replace their old furniture, Lucy gets an allowance of $500 from Ricky. Lucy goes overboard when she shops with their new neighbor Betty Ramsey, spending over three thousand dollars!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Raises Chickens : Although there are perks to living in their new country home, like House & Garden wanting to do a spread on them, the Ricardos find that it is expensive in Connecticut. Lucy decides to raise chickens and sell eggs as a moneymaking sideline.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Does The Tango : The Ricardos and Mertzes, impatient with their egg selling business, decide that they must trade in their 500 chicks for 200 egg laying hens. However, after a couple of weeks, these hens don't yield many eggs at all.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ragtime Band : Lucy decides to take part in the fund-raising campaign of the Westport Historical Society and offers to get her husband and his band to perform for their kickoff function. There's only one hitch – Ricky refuses to do it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's Night In Town : Lucy dreams of a night in New York City after spending six whole weeks in their new Connecticut home and it turns into a nightmare. Carefully hoarded tickets to a Broadway musical are supposed to take the Ricardos and the Mertzes to see the sold-out show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Search : The Autobots join Vector Prime to search for the Omega Lock, while Overhaul is left stranded by a surprise attack by Megatron and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Deep : Overhaul and Megatron try to convince inhabitants of the Jungle Planet of their 'good' intentions, while the Autobots investigate the appearance of a new Atlantean symbol.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Ship : After the "Atlantis" ship disappeared, Optimus Prime and Megatron head to the moon where it's hiding while Vector Prime and the kids locate the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Assault : A three-way battle unfolds between the Decepticons, the Autobots, and Starscream's forces. Then, an Autobot warrior named Wing Saber appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Starscream : With the Autobots closing in, Starscream unleashes the Omega Lock's power and grows to a tremendous size.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: United : Override, Evac, and Leobreaker are sent to help the Cybertron Defense team on Cybertron. Megatron's Decepticons follow as well as Thunderblast who joins Megatron. Optimus and Wing Saber combine and overpower Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Cybertron : The Autobots are finally able to destroy Megatron. They then try to revive Cybertron using the Omega Lock, but it triggers a reaction that seemingly begins to tear apart the planet!

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Balance : The true form of planet Cybertron is revealed as the planet sized transformer, Primus. Jolt is used as the device to connect and relay the messages of Primus, who begins to speak of things that have long since passed.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Darkness : The Autobots search for Jolt and the kids who have been kidnapped by Sideways and Starscream, but Megatron has discovered new information regarding Unicron's dark power that could alter the effects of the war.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Memory : The kids are forced to use trickery to keep Sideways and Starscream from deleting Jolt's memory, but the Autobots are getting closer with every minute.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Escape : Jolt and the kids manage to get off a distress call, but Megatron refuses to let Optimus out of battle forcing Vector Prime to lead the rescue team with one big question: will they arrive on time?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Family : In order to rescue his brother, Coby decides to go to Giant Planet. But before he leaves, he tries to tell his parents about the Transformers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Titans : Primus tries to use his spark energy to stop the black hole but Starscream interferes by throwing himself into Primus's spark energy, this causes him to grow to planet size. He then decides to take on Primus.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Warp : The Autobots travel to the Giant Planet on the old Atlantian ship Ogygia, but in the space bridge they must face off with the very mind of Atlantis itself.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Giant : The Autobots must convince giant Transformers who are only interested in building new buildings to assist them in their search for the Cyber Planet Key.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Fury : The Autobots begin the search for the missing Cyber Planet Key, but there about to have bigger problems on hand as Megatron is resurrected into the mighty Galvatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: City : Optimus and company rescue Bud and the Minicons, but Ransack and Crumplezone will do everything possible to prevent them from finding the Cyber Planet Key.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Ambush : The Autobots divide into teams and journeys to the depths of Giant Planet. However, they face a difficult battle against an attack from a strange underground structure and Decepticon.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Challenge : The black hole expands even further and the crisis has approached Jungle Planet. Leobreaker and Snarl wager the leader's throne and challenge Scourge. Meanwhile Lori discovers an image that depicts the past when Giant Planet was concealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Scourge : Although Scourge is the winner of the fight, Scourge's emotion causes him to hesitate. Among such, he encounters by chance Bud, who has formed the Mini-Con Recon Team. Meanwhile, the Cybertron Defense Team shifts into action and takes on Galvatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Optimus : The Autobots and Decepticons finally reach the lowest depths of Giant Planet. Coby and Landmine head to the spaceship Lemuria where the Planet Key is located.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Showdown : Starscream and Galvatron battle for possession of the Omega Lock and the four Planet Keys. Though the Autobots try to intervene, Soundwave and Sideways get in their way and hope to see the battle through to the end.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Guardian : Wing Saber hurries to the space bridge in the sky. However, he was not there in time and the space bridge begins to fall apart due to the battle that had just occurred. Lori grieves that she cannot return to her home world.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Homecoming : Galvatron uses his might to pull Earth, the Speed Planet, and the Jungle Planet through space bridges forcing all Transformers to unite and fight against him.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: End : Optimus approaches Galvatron to take the Omega Lock and Planet Keys. However, Galvatron is drawing out the power of the Planet Keys, and Thundercracker, Thunderblast, Ransack, and Crumplezone grow to giant size.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Unfinished : Galvatron who is worn out and without power wanders through the universe. At that time, something shining catches his eye. The voice of Starscream is heard and asks "Have You Given Up?".

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Beginning : Representatives of each planet have successively gathered together on Cybertron. The first Space Peace Conference opens with Optimus Prime. Optimus Prime makes a proposal for the construction plan of a new space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Inferno : In the final episode of Cybertron peace has settled on the Earth, but new information will reveal why Landmine arrived on Earth and not elsewhere and why Scattershot had such unusual reading when they arrived.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Divide and Conquer : Picking a packed property, Mike and Frank hope to find what they're looking for before nightfall; Mike discovers something living in the attic.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Big Bet : It's Frank vs. Mike in their biggest bet so far, and the stakes are personal; Frank will either keep his beard, or get himself a close shave.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Snow Job : In the middle of a Minnesota blizzard, Mike and Frank face the frost to uncover a rare pair of trucks on farmer Jim's spread.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Pickin' for the Fences : In Oklahoma, the guys uncover a baseball signed by one of the greatest players of all time.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank's Gamble : After the guys discover a basement full of vintage cars, Frank makes a big offer for a 1939 Plymouth; the guys find a mother lode of rare bikes and motorbikes in New Hampshire.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Picker Man Blues : Tricky Dick's Tennessee yard; Mike goes hog-wild for a vintage pig ride; Mike and Frank visit a sprawling small-town museum.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Sgt. Picker's Lonely Hearts Club : At a drive-in, Mike and Danielle uncover a reel of Beatles footage that could turn out to be the only one of its kind.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Woody's Picking Paradise : It's a picking paradise as Mike and Frank come across a huge 200,000-square-foot factory housing a private collection cultivated by Woody, the building's dumpster-diving owner.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Red, White and Blues : Mike and Frank unearth a music jackpot in an old general store; a hoarder's house holds on to its secrets.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank's Dog Days : Mike gets lucky while freestyling in Virginia with Danielle; a cold call pays off with a pink jukebox; Doug's honey hole of petroliana; Henry's trailers packed with unusual collectibles; Danielle proves she's got a picker's eye.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Einstein Gamble : A former firefighter gives the guys unprecedented access to his jam-packed barns and sheds; a glittering collection of oddities and memorabilia; the first glimpse of the new store addition.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: For a Few Dollars More : A fast-talking negotiator is determined to get top dollar for every last piece of her collection; a local artist has a killer collection of atomic age lamps and glow-in-the-dark sculptures; a lone mountain home features its own jailhouse.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Hot Rod Hero : Mike and Frank discover a fleet of amazing concept cars, some so unique they don't know how to price them.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Driving Miss Dani : Gene's oversized collection of steam engines; an estate sale junkie who is ready to downsize; the guys scour a 500,000-square-foot warehouse to uncover some sideshow relics.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Belly Dance : Dale gets seriously cranked up over Mike's one-of-a-kind belly tank racer; Tommy's treasure-packed barn yields some incredible railroad relics; Frank steps in to save the day for Mike; Bruce's jam-packed property.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Tough Texas : The guys try tracking down a Texas-sized honey hole; the guys uncover one of the coolest cars they've ever seen; a Harley Knucklehead.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Oddities and Commodities : At a gas station transformed into an eccentric home, Mike and Frank explore a collection that sends chills up their spines.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: War of the Worms/I Owe You One : Brain is always taking the fun out of Fern's storytelling by correcting her facts, but things gets out of hand when Fern tricks him with a fake story! Buster is always asking for favors. Will he learn the real meaning of friendship?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Blackout/Mei Lin Takes a Stand : It's a hot day in Elwood City, and a total blackout leaves its residents without electricity! Will Arthur and DW survive without AC and TV? Binky's baby sister Mei-Lin isn't keen on learning to walk and would rather stick to crawling.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Home Sweet Home/Do You Believe in Magic : It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Tales of Grotesquely Grim Bunny/Pet Projects : When the comic book store changes owners, the new darker comics are right up Fern's alley, but Arthur can't seem to stomach them. Arthur and Francine enter their pets to compete against each other in the "Perfect Pet" video contest.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Follow the Bouncing Ball/Buster Baxter and the Letter from the Sea : Alberto Molina's beloved soccer ball--signed by his favorite Ecuadorian soccer star --is lost! While on vacation, Buster discovers a message in a bottle on the shore. Could it be a message from the people of the lost city of Atlantis?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Around the World in 11 Minutes/Muffy and the Big Bad Blog : Pal, Baby Kate, Amigo, and Mei Lin enthusiastically accept Nemo's dare to travel around the world and make it back in 11 minutes. Then, Muffy discovers that web blogging is a great way to keep her readers up to date with her every move.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Unravels/All the Rage : Grandma Thora teaches Arthur to knit and he's really into this new hobby. But…he's a kid! And a boy! Knitting is a grandma thing, right? And, Muffy wants to rock the fashion world, but creating a fad is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W., Queen of the Comeback/In My Africa : The Tibbles tease, D.W. fires back, the Tibbles taunt, D.W. has a snappy comeback, and round and round they go! Will it ever end? Then, D.W.'s new classmate, Cheikh, is Brain's young cousin…and is also from Senegal, Africa!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home : Inspired by footage of the moon landing, Buster wants to go to outer space someday! For now, it'd be cool to build and launch a rocket! Then, after costing Lakewood Elementary the win in a relay race, George wants to redeem himself.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Fifteen : How much can Arthur and his friends do in 15 minutes? Can they all accomplish these missions impossible before the clock counts all the way down? Only time will tell!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: I Wanna Hold Your Hand/Whistling in the Wind : During a shopping trip to the mall, Binky gets caught doing the uncoolest of all the uncool things in the world--holding his mom's hand! If the Tibbles are supposed to be exactly the same, why can Tommy whistle while Timmy can't?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster's Secret Admirer/The Last King of Lambland : Buster receives a box of chocolates in the mail from a secret admirer. It's driving him crazy! Who could possibly like him that much? And James receives a gift from his uncle in Scotland--a toy lamb that will give its owner special powers!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Cents-less/Buster the Lounge Lizard : Mr. Ratburn decides it's time for his class to learn a little about money. For the entire weekend, no one in the class can spend a cent. Buster has the brand-new Dark Bunny Dark Buggy, complete with grappling hook and voice commands!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: To Eat or Not to Eat/S.W.E.A.T. : A brand-new candy bar is in town! And what exactly is this ingredient called Tri-Enzomated Zorn Jelly, anyway? Then, it's time for the kids at Lakewood Elementary to take the "S.W.E.A.T” test and anxiety is running high.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Grandpa Dave's Memory Album/Buster's Carpool Catastrophe : Grandpa Dave is moving closer to the family, but something isn't quite right--he's forgetting all sorts of things. And Muffy, Arthur and Buster are carpooling to their cooking class. Can they stop fighting and have fun?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Prunella the Packrat/What's in a Name? : Prunella saves everything. Can Arthur help her break her packrat habits in time to put together the display for the school's Earth Day fair? Binky find out that his real name isn't Binky--it's Shelley?!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy's Classy Classics Club/Best Enemies : Muffy buys all of the books and dolls in the Pretty Pioneers series and invites her friends to join a pretty book club. Mom has new clients coming over and they have a daughter who is D.W.'s age. They're going to be the best of friends!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster's Garden of Grief/Through the Looking Glasses : Buster is in charge of the community garden, but it proves to be too much for just one person. Arthur can't find his glasses and has to get new ones, but the attention he is getting from these new glasses has gone straight to his head!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Butler Did...What?/The Trouble with Trophies : Bailey is missing! Muffy discovers a series of clues and is left wondering, who exactly IS Bailey? Then, everyone loves getting trophies, right? It turns out that Fern could not care less about them.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Based on a True Story (Part 1 & 2) : There's a new kid in town: Ladonna Compson, the Louisiana native with the gift of gab. Ladonna charms Arthur and friends with her amazing "true" stories. But are her stories really fact…or fiction?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Flippity Francine/Muffy Takes the Wheel : When Muffy posts a goofy video of Francine on the Muffington Post, Francine worries she will become the laughing stock of the entire school. And it's the 1st Annual Lakewood Derby and Muffy's revved up!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: All About D.W./Blockheads : When Emily gets the starring role in the preschool play, D.W. is beside herself with jealousy. She should be Little Red Riding Hood, not Tree #2! Then, D.W. and Emily are upset when they get stuck with the blocks at playtime.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Get Smart/Baby Steps : Everyone loves HUGO--the new interactive whiteboard that claims to be 100% accurate. If only Mr. Ratburn knew how to use it. Mei Lin can say "hello" AND play the piano?!? Kate can't even wave!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Night of the Tibble/Read and Flumberghast : The Tibble Twins are having their first sleepover! Will the Tibbles lock James in the dark basement? Then, a cupcake's been stolen! The primary suspect: Tommy Tibble. D.W. gathers a jury and demands that justice be served.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Last Tough Customer/Brain's Chess Mess : The Tough Customers realize it's time to quit bullying and set out to find a new hobby--but can Molly ever truly change her ways? And Brain starts a chess club at school to improve his game and beat Los Dedos, the local chess master.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Baseball Blues/Brain's Biggest Blunder : It's Grebelings season and George can't wait to play! After all, no one knows more about baseball than George. Then, wBrain gets teamed with Buster and Binky in the annual Arithmattack competition.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster's Book Battle/On the Buster Scale : Lakewood Elementary has just instituted IRP; a program where kids can earn points (and prizes!) for reading. Then, Buster and Brain never agree on movies. Buster rates every film a 10+, while Brain doesn't seem to like anything.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Fern and the Case of the Stolen Story/Sue Ellen Vegges Out : Fern has writer's block! Fortunately, Ladonna's full of stories, and Fern decides to "borrow" the tales and simply change the names. Then, when Sue Ellen decides to stop eating meat, Muffy and Francine compete to be the best vegetarian.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: So Funny I Forgot to Laugh/The Best Day Ever : Arthur thinks his jokes about Sue Ellen's new sweater are in good fun but Sue Ellen's feelings are hurt. Has Arthur become a bully? Everyone is reminiscing about their "best days." Except Arthurs. Is it possible he doesn't have one?

programme.title: Insidious
programme.desc: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

programme.title: Insidious: Chapter 2
programme.desc: The Lamberts believe that they have defeated the spirits that have haunted their family, but they soon discover that evil is not beaten so easily.

programme.title: Insidious: Chapter 3
programme.desc: Psychic Elise Rainier (Lin Shaye) reluctantly agrees to use her ability to converse with the dead to help a teenage girl (Stefanie Scott) who is being tormented by a dangerous supernatural entity.

programme.title: Gamer
programme.desc: A death-row inmate (Gerard Butler) is caught between the inventor (Michael C. Hall) of a deadly online game and a group that opposes the inventor's high-tech slavery.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: After a successful mission to free a Chinese hostage, a highly trained operative (Gina Carano) is betrayed and left for dead by someone in her own agency.

programme.title: The Company You Keep
programme.desc: After a reporter (Shia LaBeouf) uncovers his real identity, a former Weather Underground activist (Robert Redford) goes on the run to track down his former lover (Julie Christie), a fellow member of his cell who never gave up the fight.

programme.title: Before I Go to Sleep
programme.desc: Terrifying new truths cause a woman (Nicole Kidman) with a memory disorder to question everything -- and everyone -- in her life.

programme.title: Crypto
programme.desc: A Wall Street banker connects a small-town art gallery to a global conspiracy, putting his own family in grave danger.

programme.title: Catch the Bullet
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal returns home from the trail to discover his 12-year-old son has been kidnapped by outlaws.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Betrayed by his stepfather, the King, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Falesha & Jacqueline : Falesha's name and pictures were stolen by a fake profile that nearly ruined her life. She thought her troubles were behind her, but four years later her past comes back to haunt her. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Mike and Caroline : Mike fell in love with Caroline online. He grew suspicious when she continually evaded meeting him, yet left notes at his car. Is Caroline an imposter or is she just afraid?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Antoinette & Albert : A year after meeting 'T-lights' on Instagram, 'instaceleb' Antoinette is ready to meet him, but he always brushes off the idea. Is he really the online celebrity he claims to be?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Sunny & Jamison : Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jesse & Brian : Jesse met Brian online. They made plans to meet, but Brian stood her up. Now, years later, Brian has asked her to live with him. But, she can't stop wondering - what is Brian hiding?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: John & Kelsey : John is ready to leave Detroit but one thing holds him back: Kelsey. The two have never spoken outside of online chats but John is sure she's the one. Can he include Kelsey in his plans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Devan & Rylan : For shy Devan, meeting Rylan was love at first click. Devan wants to believe that Rylan is marriage material but her suspicious behaviour is leaving him with doubts. (S4, ep18)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Steven & Samm : Steven is due to graduate high school, instead of planning for college he wants to move to California for his online love, Samm. Steven's mom is sceptical of Samm's identity.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jamey and Ari : Jamey fell for Ari online, and he will do anything to meet her, but she will only do it on TV! Nev and Max help Ari share her story, and she hopes Jamey will accept her as she is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Antwane & Tony : Nev and Max are contacted by Carmen who is sounding the alarm on behalf of her cousin, Antwane. He's been in a 3-year romance with a man named Tony that he met on a telephone chat line.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Tiana & James : After a three-year online relationship, Tiana moved across the country to be with the love of her life, James, and reveal her secret. But now James seems more elusive than ever. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Rod & Ebony : Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jarrod & Abby : How do young people who've embraced the digital age find love? Often by connecting online with others they've never met in person before. The problem -- that cute guy you may be falling in love with could be lying about who he really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Solana & Elijah : Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Felipe & Jasmine : Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Young M.A. : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Young M.A joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about people who have HOT SAUCE, the meaning of RED LYFE, and the joy of CASH BATHS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Grossest Episode Ever : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, things get grosser than ever when Rob, Chanel, and Steelo check out some talented ASS MASTERS, avoid the BOOGIE KNIGHTS and discover the disgusting side of MOTHER BIRDING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling LI : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get to the bottom of fake news with VIDEO OR DIDN'T HAPPEN, describe the joy that is a CROWDGASM, and see what happens when you take too much melatonin and go MELATONIC.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Happy Everything Episode : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Snowdiculousness : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the greatest form of precipitation, Rob, Steelo and Chanel pay a visit to the CUL-DE-SLOPES, watch some ICE CARPADES, and find evidence of the elusive SNOW SCORPIONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Mark Cuban : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Mark Cuban joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to discuss future investments in the MARK TANK, try to solve the CUBAN BATHROOM CRISIS and explore the DANGERS OF DUNKING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chick-ulousness : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness it's Ladies Night! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate incredible women with SUPER SHE-ROES, pay homage to mothers in MOMMIN' AIN'T EASY, and explore the fabled women's restroom in LEGENDS OF THE STALL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Christina Milian : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy nominated singer-songwriter and actress Christina Milian joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to be amazed by some SUPERHUMANS, give some restaurants an F-RATING, and be terrorized by some FEATHER SHARKS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Nerdiculousness : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, dedicated to the smart people who make our world a better place, Rob, Steelo and Chanel take a look at some lesser-known NERDACHIEVEMENTS, the dark side of science, with TRIAL AND TERROR

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Bro-diculousness : On a special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in BRO-MOTION, learn what it means to be BRO-PROOF, and study the special bro bond IN BRO WE TRUST.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling LII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel get dodge ball damaged in RUBBER STAMPED, become masters of disguise with BLENDERS, and get too honest dropping TRUTH BOMBS

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Mike Posner : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness singer/songwriter/producer Mike Posner joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to take TOO MANY PILLS, explore some BROMANTIC BONDS and learn about WHITE GIRL PROBLEMS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jordan Clarkson : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to throw down some JAMMIES, check out the TONGUE CAM and experience some water pain in the category GETTIN' LAKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Waka Flocka Flame : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Keyshia Cole : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Highdiculousness : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the world of weed, Rob, Steelo and Chanel check out some ANIMALS IN PANTS, explore what it's like to have BONG BRAIN and ask themselves the question AM I HIGH?

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rockdiculousness with Steel Panther : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness the 80's are back with Rockdiculousness! Steel Panther joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to fire up the FLAME FUEL, grab some COMMUNITY PROPERTY and tempt death with LIVIN' ON A PRAYER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Ridiculousness 500 : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, we celebrate the world of NASCAR, with a salute to PASS MASTERS, an introduction to NASCAR EXITS, and a look at what happens when people get PAVEMENTAL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Wheeler Walker, Jr : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by country musician Wheeler Walker, Jr. to discuss his BANNED MATES, analyze grooming techniques in MUFF MAINTENANCE, and explore the embarrassment of PREMATURE RELEASES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Matt Shively : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some PARANORM-ISH ACTIVITY, do some ATTEMPTED MAN SHIT and meet some animals that are MILK READY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Ryan O'Malley : Laugh along with Rob, Steelo, and Chanel as they break down hilarious Redneck Good Times, Nutflix, and Double Whammies. Guest Ryan O'Malley, a professional pogo sticker, shows the highs and lows of being Pogo Stuck.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville : Movie Star Johnny Knoxville helps Rob break down Makeshift Ramps, Freak Beasts, and Poorly Placed Kids. Learn why you're Never too Old to Slam and why birds are not your friend.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Big Black : Rob's former co-star Big Black joins the panel, breaking down Makeshift Thrill Rides, Bieber Hair, and Coming in Hot. See how human scorpions sting in a whole different way than the spider that attacks an innocent dad.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Travis Pastrana : Action sports star Travis Pastrana helps Rob illustrate some Poorly Placed Trees and Whiskey Throttles. Rob breaks down Pastranabees and Animals Being Human. Explode with laughter at an ill-fated Butt Bottle Rocket.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Dingo : Action sports personality The Dingo joins Rob in breaking down Pain Angels, Worst Case Scenarios and things That'll Cost You. And you'll never guess what happens when a heavy lifter loses control.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Matthew Mounce : Rob, Steelo, and Chanel laugh till it hurts at Unnecessary Combos, people who should Stay out of the water, and others who just plain wonder Who Put That There? Karate expert Matthew Mounce helps break down some Bad Karate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jeff Tremaine : Producer Jeff Tremaine joins Rob in breaking down what it means to Lawnchair and Slam and Sprint. Some kids start slamming young in Ridiculousness in Training, and Rob points out Your Friend's a Dick.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Matt Schlager : Beauty Queen Caite Upton joins Steelo on the panel. Rob breaks down the magic of Man-kinis and Dodging Bullets. Guest Matt Schlager demonstrates how to fall with your face first and hands second, in Getting Schlagered.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chris "Drama" Pfaff : Rob's cousin Drama helps Rob break down Family Dysfunction, Your Friend's a Dick, and Little Rollers. Credit Cards compete for pain against Popsicles. And learn whether Parkour is an art or just some Aggressive Running.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Judd Leffew : Bull rider Judd Leffew schools Chanel on whether bulls get dizzy when Rob breaks down A Bunch of Bull and Angry Animals. Watch fools compete in the Ridiculousness Decathlon. And a whole lot of people get Dunked.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Biker Fox : Caite Upton joins Steelo once again as Rob shows off S**t Whips and Redneck Good Times. A lot of people blow out their money-makers in De-Faced. Biker Fox joins the panel for some fun in spandex and scrapes in Biker Down.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Ryan Dunn : TV star Ryan Dunn joins the fun as Rob points out the problems with Lower Education. See some folks who are clearly Out of Your League while others get slammed in That's What You Get and Let Me Help You Hurt Yourself.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Dan Heaton : Rob breaks down Why Rollerblading Should Make a Comeback. Witness a merry-go-round of pain in Worst Case Scenario, Almost Made It and Not Even Close. And guest unicyclist Dan Heaton shows off some Uni-Psychos.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Cole Hernandez : Learn How Not to Treadmill and why Grass is Your Friend. See a wake of damage after Trees Strike Back. Guest dancer Cole Hernandez brings some Weird Dancing. Some skaters get Racked. Rob narrates Chicken Police.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Dingo II : The Dingo is back! Laugh as a whole lot of people have a Tough Day on the Job, find out if You're Too Old For That, and who's Almost Awesome. Rob breaks down Skiers vs. Snowboarders. Shoes go flying off in Shoe Down.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killers From the Abyss : Fishing detective, Jeremy Wade, continues the biggest investigation of his career as he delves into the mystery of what happened to the RMS Laconia.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Freshwater Shark : After reports of a bloody attack, Jeremy investigates the myth of the freshwater shark.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: American Killers : Jeremy Wade travels the United States in search of river monsters living in the nation's waterways. He goes from the Indian River Lagoon in Florida to the Lake of the Ozarks in Missouri.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Malaysian Lake Monster : Two men mysteriously vanish on a remote lake in Malaysia just hours apart. Amid rumours that a giant fish is on the loose, biologist and monster-hunter Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Russian Killer : The disappearance of three men in Russia proves to be a baffling case for Jeremy Wade. He embarks on a trip to the Amur River where he seeks to uncover what happened to them.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Return of the Killer Catfish : Jeremy Wade investigates a case in Nepal that sounds strangely familiar - a lone fisherman dragged off his feet and into a mountain river by the original river monster, the goonch catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Pack of Teeth : From the swamps in southern Africa there are stories of a piranha-like fish that hunts in marauding packs. Jeremy Wade heads into the watery labyrinth to find this deadly swarm.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Congo Killer : Jeremy explores the legends and mystery surrounding the Congo River in central Africa.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: River of Blood : Wade comes face-to-face with one of South America's greatest freshwater fighting fish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Electric Executioner : Jeremy Wade is in Brazil's cattle country in search of a beast that has already killed three cowboys. Locals fear for Jeremy as he discovers the shocking truth about this frightening fish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Snakehead : Jeremy Wade homes in on a predator now invading America's backyards. Said to breathe air and crawl on land, the snakehead is rumoured to be able to kill a human.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Canadian Horror : Canada's waterlogged wilderness is home to many legends, and Jeremy Wade is particularly interested in the story of a 20-foot-long lake monster that attacks humans. He makes it his mission to track down this shadowy predator.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Phantom Assassin : Jeremy Wade visits Australia's Fitzroy River in search of one of the worlds rarest and least known fish: the Northern River Shark. It's so elusive that only 20 have been caught.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Alaska's Cold Water Killer : For years fishermen have been vanishing in Alaska's remote wilderness. For Jeremy Wade, a recent incident sends him on a search for possible suspects.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Sharks & Rays : Jeremy Wade relives some of his most dangerous catches.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: The Deadliest Catfish : Jeremy Wade relives some of his most frightening encounters with the world's deadliest catfish. What makes this type of fish so supremely dominant?

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Untold Stories : Jeremy Wades shares untold tales and previously unseen footage from his many adventures.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Top Ten Beasts : Jeremy Wade is back and recalls his top ten battles with forgotten monsters from the deep. Meet the prehistoric alligator gar and the enormous wels catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Lair of Giants : Jeremy Wade explores the Essequibo, Guyana's largest river. Armed with only old journals and his rod, Jeremy is on a mission to discover if monsters of the past still exist.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 12 : Bear's pupils wake from a less-than-restful night's sleep and must pull together as a team to ensure they cross the final obstacles between them and the summit of Mount Cnicht.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Transatlantic Crossing : Engine failure en route to Portugal forces one Turkey crew to negotiate a treacherous return to Santa Maria. Mikey and Scott search for a new rampie.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Thin Ice : Crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake. En route to Turkey, Arnie and Justin face some serious volcanoes and massive Mediterranean air traffic.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Love at First Flight : Jennifer tries to get a sensitive parrot to his owner before depression sets in and Roy run gets delayed after his truck breaks down.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: One Crystal Short of a Geode : "Big Rig" driver, Marc Springer, gets more than he bargained for when he comes toe to toe with an irate customer. "Rookie" Jarrett manages to barely pass a customer inspection after delivering two unique sculptures to a museum.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: From Sphere to Infinity & Beyond : Roy shows his softer side by offering to deliver a coin-operated ride to a boy who just lost his father. Chris and Robbie run into some legal troubles when they are pulled over in Arizona.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Chicken Ship : Marc runs into some bad weather that takes a toll on an exposed, custom-built hot rod. Jarrett just barely squeezes three chicken coops into his trailer.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Mud Bug Boogie : "Big Rig" Marc hits a violent hailstorm while transporting an enormous trolley bus that might just be over the height limit. Jennifer fights the scorching summer sun while she races to get 400 lbs. of live crawfish on ice to a restaurant opening.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Not with a Whimper but a Bang : "The Hotshot Couple" catch a bad flu en route to the pickup of a state-of-the-art nuclear bomb shelter and Chris butts heads with the seller on the loading of the oversized bunker. Jarrett wins the most expensive load of his career--an Indy 500 racecar.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Flux Capacity : Roy's truck comes to a screeching halt when it breaks down for the last time while Jarrett delivers a $150,000 restored Delorean to a nit-picking customer.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Wheels of Misfortune : Jarrett endures the worst load of his career with a carriage too large for his trailer while Jennifer must hire out help to assist with the loading of a carnival ride.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Wings, A Prayer, and a Know-It-All : Chris and Robbie do their first "motherload" -- a vintage DC-7 Airplane -- while Roy helps a community to rebuild their homes after the devastating Bastrop, Texas fires.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Big Idea, Bad Idea : Chris and Robbie haul an enormous spider to an amusement park with a strict delivery schedule. The precariously positioned arachnid requires reinforcements to ensure its safety, putting the young couple to work.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Cruisin' for a Bruisin' : Jennifer has two days to get a six-layer wedding cake to a reception completely intact. After picking up a Bozo the Clown arcade game, she books it to get to the wedding in time, but when she arrives, the pastry chefs do not like what they see.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Caviar : Region 7 wardens converge upon the Intake fishing access site on the Yellowstone River as the annual paddlefish migration is in full swing. Watch anglers snag paddlefish and Wardens snag illegal anglers!

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Camper : The Tongue River Reservoir State Park in south-central Montana is a popular summer destination for recreationists and fishermen, and Warden Mike Krings has his hands full keeping peace among the night crowd.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Yellowstone : Wardens in Region 5 work their way up the Yellowstone River with a jet boat checking fly fishing outfitters while coming across a boat accident along the way. Then it's over to Region 1 for firearms training.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Antelope Dummy : With Pronghorn antelope populations dwindling, Wardens of Region 7 run a decoy sting the day before the season begins but the real problem arises with trespassing on the opener. Then Region 4 Warden Bryan Golie has a potential poaching call.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Cascade : The Upper Missouri River is a blue-ribbon trout fishery & popular rafting destination. The Cascade district in Region 4 has its share of excitement with the mysterious camper parked on private land. Then over to Region 7 for some water safety checks.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Blackfoot : Region 2 wardens are responding to a Tip Mont call with multiple elk down in grizzly country. Upon arrival, one elk & the suspect are missing. In the meantime, wardens in Region 7 have shots fired during a decoy sting.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Spotted Dog : When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Boat Float : In the shadows of the crazy mountains, the Yellowstone River becomes a rainbow of color during the annual boat float weekend. With jet boats, the Wardens are prepared for a crazy weekend of protecting the river and assisting the crazed rafters.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Mac Pass : This week our Wardens receive a Tip-Mont call about a few illegally taken elk and pursue the the suspects.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Paddlefish : This week our Wardens are in Montana monitoring the rivers while people paddlefish and we also try and eliminate a pesky bear from one man's property.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Interstate Game Check : This week the Wardens set up a game checkpoint to make sure everyone is following the rules.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Chuck Coal : When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Warden : When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Ohv : Montana Game Wardens set up an operation targeting illegal off-road vehicle usage. We also follow a patrol along the Missouri River, making sure the boaters are safe and legal.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Antler Blitz : Montana Game Wardens look into illegally taken antlers. Plus, follow along as they help with conservation efforts for sage grouse and walleye

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Waterfall : Snowfall in Montana make for treacherous waters, but that doesn't stop the annual boat float. Follow Montana Game Wardens as they patrol the rivers to ensure the safety and legal compliance of the boaters.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Operation Snow Cat : Montana Game Wardens patrol the high country during winter with snow mobiles. It's also elk season, and the wardens check for compliance with hunting laws.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Rock Slide : Gabe faces a crew mutiny; the guys at Lemare put their chaser to the test; Shelby and Belinda take to the open road to bring home a money log; James Smith lashes out against his own crew.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby's New Toy : Shelby builds his new empire one big toy at a time; the men of S&S Aqua Logging deal with last week's fallout; DJ suffers an injury that could take him out of the season; a whole new kind of logging.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: We're Not Alone : Joe Linderborg is back in the yarder seat and the whole crew is paying the price; DJ comes face-to-face with Craig after two years; Shelby and niece Stephanie stumble into a wasp's nest; S&S realizes they aren't alone on the Withlacoochee River.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Sabotage : Shelby must rely on niece Stephanie and cousin Belinda to do his dirty work; the rigging guys formulate a plan to get rid of DJ; James must cope with his dad's health issues while also leading his crew.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Put Up or Shut Up : DJ Jeremiah is pushed to his breaking point; Coatsy boots Joe Linderborg from his seat in the yarder; the Dreadknots find themselves on the wrong end of a falling log; Shelby and his assistants fight to claim the biggest Cypress of the season.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Cage Match : Three years of tension between Craig and DJ comes to a head; the Swamp Man goes on a special mission for his wife; the end of the North Thorn site may mean the end of the season at Papac; the Dreadknots are in the line of fire.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Flipping Logzilla : The Swamp Man targets a money log in dangerous territory; DJ gets put on notice; Brad and Swilley struggle to keep S&S from running off the rails.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Rock Slide : Gabe faces a crew mutiny; the guys at Lemare put their chaser to the test; Shelby and Belinda take to the open road to bring home a money log; James Smith lashes out against his own crew.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby's New Toy : Shelby builds his new empire one big toy at a time; the men of S&S Aqua Logging deal with last week's fallout; DJ suffers an injury that could take him out of the season; a whole new kind of logging.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Gators & Hand Grenades : The Dreadknots come face-to-face with one of the most fearsome creatures in the river; Shelby and Donna put his new paddle barge to work; DJ returns to work but faces another battle with Craig; the Woodchucks push hard to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Goldmine : Shelby puts his new toys to work and discovers a huge payday in his own backyard; runaway logs send Craig over the edge; Joe and Coatsy strike out on their own; the Woodchucks battle a crumbling wall ; Jimmy Smith says goodbye.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The Hurricane Hits : When Hurricane Isaac hits the bayou, Shelby Stanga must race to save his logging empire; a string of crew meltdowns at Rygaard sends the site into chaos; Brad and Swilley struggle to get S&S back in the Log-Off after losing their captain.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Calling It Quits : The Swamp Man attempts a daring rescue of his aging relatives from the rising storm waters; the Woodchucks don't make their deadline and their company hangs in the balance; S&S finally hits a honey hole with the help of Swilley's brother.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The Aftermath : Gabe brings in someone very unexpected to fill out his shorthanded crew; S&S' bad luck streak continues when they wreck their boat and get into a fight with the Dreadknots; Joe and Coatsy come up with a new plan to start their own company.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Unlucky Charm : Shelby goes on a treasure-hunting mission and ends up in a race against Belinda; Jesse's lesson on the whistles almost takes Luke out; S&S continues to struggle; the Dreadknots' lucky charm gets destroyed.

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Engineering Disasters of the '70s : The sinking of the Edmund Fitzgerald; the Buffalo Creek Dam disaster; the explosion of a supertanker in Los Angeles Harbor.

programme.title: Firefighting!
programme.desc: The Arson Detectives : The work of arson detectives, from a suspicious fire in Houston to the motives behind recent church fires.

programme.title: Firefighting!
programme.desc: Containing the Demon : How science and technology have changed firefighting; some of the worst fire disasters in American history.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Civil War Tech : America's technologically advanced military descends from Civil War innovations; the first modern war introduced machine guns, aerial reconnaissance, battlefield medicine, ironclad ships, and aircraft carriers that revolutionized warfare.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Made in the USA : The world's biggest and oldest flag manufacturer; inside the last US athletic shoe factory; the strangest form of alternate transportation; a hot toy company that believes it's imperative to keep their work here at home.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: D-Day Tech : The Allies devise scientific and mechanical breakthroughs to thwart Hitler's Atlantic Wall and to make the D-Day invasion successful.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
