programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Fry It : Fairgrounds fried classics such as funnel cakes and churros; frog legs; Twinkies and Coke; forging a cast iron frying pan; Kentucky's World Chicken Festival.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Moving America : To see how people, products, and more move around America, Adam Richman explores how a legendary long-hauler meticulously custom-builds each truck at Daimler.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Edwards Air Force Base : Examine Edwards Air Force Base's colorful history as America's premier flight test center for over 60 years; every Air Force aircraft was tested there, including current projects like the Airborne Laser designed to destroy ballistic missiles.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Mad Electricity : Each flip of an electric-light switch attests to the genius of Nikola Tesla, creator of the alternating current (AC) system; the Tesla coil; energy-efficient bulbs.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Dredging : Dredgers clear and deepen ports for vessels that carry megacontainers.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: NickToons
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Cup O' Universe / You're In Trouble : The kids discover a universe in a milkshake cup. While at Tufflips overnight camp, the dudes do their best not to wet the bed.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Booger Johnson / Dream Rangers : Craig can’t stop eating Megan’s pet gerbil. Sanjay and Craig must re-enter their dream to rescue Belle.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Day of the Snake / Prickerbeast : Sanjay discovers all the awesome things Craig does when Sanjay's at school. The kids discover a local legend is a lie and get revenge on their parents.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Fartwerk / Ting : Sanjay and Craig seek to create a symphony of farts, and one person holds the one they desperately need: Noodman. When the kids discover a mysterious object buried in Sanjay's backyard, their imaginations run wild.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Fowl Work / Rash Thrash : When Sanjay and Craig get the once in a lifetime opportunity to work at the Frycade, they soon discover Belle's secret life. Sanjay develops an allergy to Craig - could this mean the end of the dude snake duo?

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Wild Buds / Depants Tag : Sanjay and Craig make a bet to see who can live the longest in the wild. A highly-competitive game of de-pantsing sweeps Lundgren.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: King of Kids / Ew De Hector : A group of young kids idolize Sanjay and Craig. Sanjay and Craig bottle Hector’s divine-smelling sweat and sell it as cologne.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Romper Chomper / Conquistador : The search is on for Megan's two front teeth after she loses them in an epic- fail bike stunt. Sanjay's grandmother gives the dudes a conquistador statue from Darlene's childhood - and it seems to have a mind of its own.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Chewhuahuas / Space Invaders : The kids are trapped on top of a garbage dumpster, surrounded by a pack of Chihuahuas. Sanjay and Craig decide something must be done to stop Hector’s close talking tendencies.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Street Dogg : Sanjay and Craig try to reunite former rap duo Street Dogg and Tufflips, but their failed efforts only lead to a town divided - and the mother of all rap battles!

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: D.I.N.K. / Dangerous Debbie : Sanjay and Craig are suspicious of the family’s new high-tech car that anticipates their every whim. A love-smitten Craig kidnaps an electric eel from the tank of a sushi restaurant.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Serpentco / Chrome Dome : The dudes go undercover with Tufflips to investigate a crime ring that's pirating action hero's movies. Sanjay and Craig go on a quest to find the top of a lawyer's head from a roadside billboard advertisement.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Snake Parts Unknown / Flabyrinth : Sanjay and Craig take celebrity "foodie" Anthony Gourmand on a Lundgren eating adventure. Sanjay and Craig are thrilled to win a tour through Tufflips' movie-themed labyrinth, but soon realize there may be no escape.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: And Justice For Durdle/Beauty and the Beard : Noodman files a lawsuit against Farmer Larry that could cost him Blueberry Farm and his beloved hounds. Sanjay is thrilled that Penny and Belle are sleeping over at his house, but an embarrassing video could ruin the night.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Hot Heads/Lundgren Loner : Wanting to experience the ultimate coolness of Lake Lundgren, the kids set out to achieve "heat nirvana" before their big dive. Sanjay must cope with spending an entire afternoon alone.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Bike-o Psycho/Boulder Rollers : Sanjay and Craig find an abandoned bike and nurse it back to life, but they must deal with the owner who wants it back. The kids team up to push a boulder into Lake Lundgren.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Guitar Zeroes/Heartyface : Sanjay and Craig seek out a mythic guitar legend. Craig becomes obsessed with gaining popularity on a social media website.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Galaxy Geeks/Freaks and Cheeks : The epic "Alien Craig" fantasy space adventure continues with Noodman joining the kids on a new mission. Dog-sitting for Hector becomes Sanjay and Craig's worst nightmare.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc:
Dude Snake Nood/Barrel Boyz : Sanjay and Craig are forced on a "play date" with Noodman's nephew.
Tufflips recruits Vijay to help pull off his greatest stunt: going over Lundgren's Butt Rock Falls in a wooden barrel.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: All Night Bummer Party/Partybot Returns : The dudes celebrate their "friend-iversary" at a Frycade sleepover event, but the night doesn't go as Sanjay plans. Vijay showcases a reprogramed Partybot at a local tech expo.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Huggle Day : After ruining Lundgren’s Huggle Day celebration, Sanjay and Craig set out to right their wrong — with the help of movie hero Dolph Lundgren. Led by Dolph Lundgren, Sanjay and Craig journey to find Huggle Bunny.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Paper Pushers/Bros of a Feather : Noodman tries to uncover Sanjay and Craig’s racket of keeping money for newspapers they don’t deliver. Sanjay and Craig take an orphaned baby bird under their wings.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Ain't No Fang/Balzalderac! : Craig teaches Sanjay the art of being a snake. Sanjay and Craig's actions in the present affect a future episode from"season twelve."

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Master Smashers/All Couped Up : The dudes discover the primal satisfaction of smashing stuff. Sanjay and Craig enter a contest to win a new car.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Stunt School Special : When Craig joins Sanjay at Stuntman Middle School, he finds that Sanjay is living in the shadow of an academic overachiever.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Combo Attack/Stuffed Curse Pizza : Megan makes an unlikely friend with Chido and struggles to keep it secret. After a string of clumsy accidents, Sanjay is convinced he’s cursed.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Quietude Dudes/Diaper Dinks : Sanjay and Craig compete to see who can be quiet the longest. The kids revert to babies and join Baby Richard on an adventure.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Halloweenies/G.U.T.S. Busters : The gang wishes every day was Halloween-so they decide to make it happen. Sanjay and Craig compete on a road-show version of the classic Nickelodeon series "G.U.T.S." Guest Stars: Mike O'Malley & Moira Quirk

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Songjay/Man of Squeal : Sanjay and Craig appeal to the people of Lundgren to watch the appearance of a rare double-comet. Sanjay and Craig have to stop Vijay’s pig obsession.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Friend Card/Beach Butts : An old rivalry between Darlene and Noodman is reignited when the guys discover a Friend Card. Sanjay and Craig become beach bums for a day.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: JJ and Greg/Tuff Rider : Sanjay and Craig become best buds with another dude-reptile duo, until they start to take over their lives. The kids try to recruit Tufflips for their bicycle gang and dedicate themselves to teaching him to ride.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Space Train to Space/The Snake Pit : Sanjay and Craig watch a Tufflips movie at the theatre and we follow Tufflip’s story. Sanjay and Craig’s friendship gets tested when the dudes discover a secret room and Craig turns it into his personal party zone.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Booyah for Bollywood : Sanjay and Craig get to be in a Tufflips movie in India, so Vijay comes along to reconnect with his homeland and nothing turns out the way anyone expected.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Blowing Chunks : The artists are tasked with customizing guitars for Dave, a canvas gets sick during the Elimination Tattoo, and artist Forrest Cavacco joins the panel as a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Better Than Words? : The artists face off against Oliver in a Jagermeister micro-tattoo Flash Challenge, and legendary artist Bob Tyrrell joins as a guest judge to assess portrait tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The Bigger They Are : The four remaining artists meet their canvases for the last elimination tattoo, the judges choose the final three contestants, and the epic final challenge is revealed.

programme.title: Ink Master

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: It's Christmas in Canada : The Brovlofski family is dealt a devastating blow when Ike's Canadian birth parents show up unexpectedly. When the townspeople decide to forego Christmas gifts and take up a collection to get Ike home to South Park, the boys are distraught.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Canada On Strike : The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Eat, Pray, Queef : Someone plays an April Fool’s joke on the boys and it doesn’t go over well.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Crème Fraiche : Randy’s obsession with the Food Network forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Royal Pudding : The Prince of Canada is about to take a Princess and Ike is obsessed with the Royal Wedding.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Crack Baby Athletic Association : Kyle gets in on the ground floor of Cartman’s latest business venture, The Crack Baby Athletic Association.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Taming Strange : When Ike hits puberty, he and Kyle start to grow apart. To save their relationship, Kyle takes Ike to see a live performance of Yo Gabba Gabba.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Freemium Isn't Free : Stan is addicted to the new Terrance and Phillip mobile game.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Where My Country Gone? : Garrison wants to build a wall to keep out all of the undocumented immigrants.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: SUPER HARD PCness : It’s never been more challenging to be a PC Principal.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Splatty Tomato : The children of South Park claim to have seen Mr. Garrison lurking around town. The townspeople are angry that the president is scaring their children.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Death : Grandpa's sole birthday wish is for Stan to take part in his assisted suicide. Meanwhile, Mrs. Broflovski has organized a protest against the boys' favorite TV show, "Terrance and Phillip."

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin : Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip in Not Without My Anus : Terrance and Phillip must save Terrance's Little Daughter, Sally, and all of Canada from an evil dictator.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Chickenpox : The kids' parents only have their best interests at heart when they arrange for Stan, Kyle and Cartman to be exposed to the chickenpox virus.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cow Days : South Park's 14th Annual "Cow Days" rodeo and carnival is here and the boys are determined to win Terrance and Phillip dolls.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Spookyfish : When Sharon Marsh's Aunt Flo makes a monthly visit, she brings a mysterious pet fish for Stan.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Merry Christmas Charlie Manson! : Dinner with Cartman's family takes a bizarre twist when Uncle Howard shows up after breaking out of prison with the help of his cellmate, Charlie Manson.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Timmy 2000 : When Timmy is diagnosed with Attention Deficit Disorder, it triggers a wave of prescription drug abuse at South Park Elementary.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow : When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Most Outrageous Monster-In-Law Returns : The Monster-In-Law is back! Khalood confessed to calling her son-in-law, Steve, a "loser" and "dumbass" and lacing his drink with a laxative! Does she still say Steve is incapable of supporting a family? Hear what Steve’s mom has to say about the feud!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Deadbeat Dad? : Katlynn, Zach & Amber say dad Todd prioritizes everything over them: job, wife & new family. They say their dad missed weekend visits, failed to pay child support & even wrote a letter denouncing his parental rights. Could Todd do more or just a bad rap?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parental Abuse? : Dr. Phil's guests say they endure abuse from their grown children. Debbie says daughter, Amy, 31, is verbally & physically abusive. Amy admits she can be cruel to her mom, but Debbie makes her feel like a failure. As tempers flare see who storms off!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Girl In The Closet : A Dr. Phil Exclusive: Lauren, 8, locked in a pitch-black closet, lice-infested, surrounded by human waste, held captive by her mother and step-father. Lauren was found naked, emaciated, weighed 25 pounds, and stood 3-feet tall. Lauren, now 18, speaks out.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Discipline Video: A Daughter's New Accusations Against The Judge : This 2004 YouTube viral video sent shock waves, racked up millions of views, and stirred online outrage. Texas Judge William Adams is lashing his then 16-year-old daughter with a belt, despite her pleas to stop. Do you think Adam's actions are justified?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Imperfect Justice : Many were stunned and outraged when Casey Anthony was acquitted of murder charges in her daughter Caylee's death. Lead prosecutor Jeff Ashton joins Dr. Phil to answer some hard-hitting questions about where his case went wrong.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Anger Intervention : Quinn says his wife, Sara, smashed a glass door, putting several stitches in his head, and punched, slapped, and kicked him in the face. But why won't he leave her? Can Dr. Phil help mend this fractured family as he confronts Sara about the alleged abuse?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heaviest Woman On Record : At 700 lbs., Pauline, 48, has a Guinness World Record title of Heaviest Living Woman. Pauline is also a mother, daughter & friend with hopes and dreams of a better life for herself & her 18-year-old son Dillon. Can Dr. Phil help get her life on track?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Son Picked The Wrong Fiancee : Gayle says her soon-to-be daughter-in-law, Hannah, is manipulative, immoral and disrespectful and she’s never even met her! Gayle claims Hannah's relationship with her son, Ryan, is based on sin. See what happens when Gayle and Hannah meet with Dr. Phil!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil Mystery: Was Morgan Murdered By Stalkers? : In 2011, Morgan, 20, was found dead, a suspected overdose with a later ruling of death by suicide. Parents Toni & Steve believe something more sinister: she was stalked, tormented & killed by Brooke, 18, who joins the show with her dad, Jim.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heroin In Suburbia: A Town Intervention : Heroin use among America's youth is plaguing some of the most prestigious & safest suburban towns. Dr. Phil sheds light on Simi Valley, CA, where residents are fighting a heroin epidemic. Dr. Phil talks to teens., parents & meets with Mayor Bob Huber.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Absentee Mom, Clueless Dad : John says his ex-wife, Laurie, abandoned their children. John admits his boys disrespect his authority, with one son punching him in the face. As Laurie denies deserting her children, we hear from the three boys: is it clueless parenting or unruly kids?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ultimate Home Invasion : Mary says husband Jesse is abusive, unfaithful, controlling & she feels she's living in a prison. Jesse says he's not controlling, he's just "containing the beast," & his wife needs to abide by his rules if she wants to stay married. Dr. Sophy steps in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Misbehaving Moms? : Leah says mom Dora appears sweet but she's actually a narcissist, hypochondriac, drama queen & liar. Can this mother-daughter find common ground and rebuild? Plus Carrie says mom Paula, 61, has been meeting strangers online having sex. Dr. Phil weighs in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Broken Bones, Broken Hearts, Broken Engagements? : Brittany says boyfriend Tim is evil, abusive & unfaithful. Tim admits that he can't control his rage & choked Brittany while holding their 6-month-old daughter & says he fears he'll hurt the baby next. Tim confesses to cheating with both men and women.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My In-Laws Tried To Kill Me : Ramon’s former in-laws tried to murder him, and he now finds himself in a bitter custody battle with his ex-wife. Plus, multiple women claim they were sexually assaulted by a police officer in San Diego. How can victims move on from painful trauma?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Young, Innocent, And Held Captive : Two survivors of abduction, Katie Beers and Sarah Maynard, share their stories in exclusive interviews with Dr. Phil. How did they survive their horrifying ordeals?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil Visits Monster-In-Law Khalood : When Monster-In-Law Khalood last met with Dr. Phil, she wanted her lazy kids out of her house and invited Dr. Phil to her home to prove her claims. Dr. Phil takes Khalood up on her offer, and gets a firsthand look at what’s going on behind closed doors!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Lohans : Actress Lindsay Lohan's mom, Dina, has been accused of being a bad mom, to riding the coattails of her daughter. Dina sets the record straight & reveals details inside her marriage to Michael. Plus, meet a woman who says Michael is her child's father.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In Love And Illegal : Thirty-year-old mom of four, Melissa Dilan-Hernandez, made headlines when arrested and charged with having sex with her 17-year-old fiancé, T.J. The couple sits down with Dr. Phil to justify their relationship. Plus, does T.J.'s father approve?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shocking Accusations: Abused Wife Or Abused Husband? : Marie says husband Ron has a violent temper & she fears her safety & of their 4-yr-old. She alleges Ron pushed her down the stairs & wrote "kill" on a bathroom mirror. Ron says Marie mixes her meds with alcohol. Dr. Phil cameras record the chaos at home.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil

programme.desc: Unattached newcomer Kim is put in control as she chooses who she would like as a partner. Plus, new love is jeopardised, and one couple is ripped apart.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Newly single Tayla ruffles some feathers when she tries to make a move on Grant and the villa is rocked when the green-eyed monster rears its ugly head.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Eden and Erin go on a date, while Grant gets a wax. Also, the Islanders ride the Truth Bike and Francoise takes her pick as she chooses which couple to break up.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The arrival of new boy Jaxon sparks a jealous walk-out by an Islander as they decide to pack their bags and leave. Meanwhile, Elias kisses Millie in the strip-tease challenge.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Sparks fly between some of the islanders, while tensions reach breaking point for others. Plus, new addition Mac ruffles a few feathers as she goes speed dating with the villa's boys.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Eden and Erin have their first fight and Cassidy breaks down ahead of the Recoupling Ceremony.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: New arrival Dom makes the boys nervous as he catches the girls' attention and Erin plays matchmaker.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Dom whisks away two girls for a romantic date and there is trouble for new couple Cassidy and Josh.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Loved-up Grant and Tayla return from the Hideaway and Sophie delivers shock news that two boys will be dumped from the Villa.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The fallout from the previous week's shock dumping sends emotions running high through the Villa. Meanwhile, new arrival Teddy goes on some dates and ends up causing some trouble.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Recoupling Ceremony : Even Sophie is shocked as the results of the most controversial recoupling yet shakes things up.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Tayla seethes as Cassidy and Grant get closer in the Yoga Challenge whilst the two newest girls to land in Paradise, Shelby and Amelia, ignite competition in the villa.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: A surprise Recoupling leaves two girls single and at risk of being dumped off the island.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Either Cassidy or Mac will be dumped and Australia needs to decide who will be sent home.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love blossoms around the Villa, but a surprise recoupling ceremony sends one Islander home.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Past Tense : Late one evening, Harm receives a message from his ex-girlfriend. Harm returns the call and is devastated to find out that Parker is dead. Eager to help, Harm immediately makes plans to meet with Agent Kenworthy who will be leading the NCIS investigation.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Guilt : When Captain Huddleston hears that the marine corporal has been charged with rape, he sends Lt. Colonel Sarah Mac MacKenzie to handle the case in a hot zone of Anti-American activity.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mixed Messages : An intruder shoots three Navy people, killing two. One of the dead is a friend of Harm, who protects his reputation. Webb, counter-espionage, and disinformation are involved; Bud solves it. Mac and Renee return to town; Mac leaves again.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: In Thin Air : A Radar Intercept Officer dies of hypoxia, traced to contaminated oxygen. Mac prosecutes the PO apparently at fault; Harm makes a poor defense and Sturgis takes over. Harm learns the truth eventually. Bud resents Harriet's protectiveness.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Need to Know : As a favor from Congresswoman Lillian Dorning, SECNAV Sheffield asks the JAG staff to get the story of a submarine, USS Angel Shark (SSGN-559), which was lost on a CIA mission in 1968.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Friendly Fire : A Navy pilot drops a bomb on a British position, killing three soldiers and injuring others. In a court-martial he faces charges of involuntary homicide and dereliction of duty. Mac and Bud prosecute, Sturgis defends, and Harm presides.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The One That Got Away : A Marine faces a charge of dereliction after becoming lost in Iraq in a sandstorm; Sturgis prosecutes, and Mac defends. Harm flies again for the CIA, aboard a spy plane for a training hop, which turns into a real mission over North Korea.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Posse Comitatus : A Marine helo gunship intervenes during a standoff at a ranch; Mac prosecutes the pilot, and Harm defends. Bud investigates a Naval Reserve physician who, a conscientious objector, has received his medical education at Navy expense.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Good Intentions : Mac must defend a petty officer accused of murdering a female officer, but the man has no memory of the night in question, while a Navy SEAL who purchased nerve gas needs Bud's help to avoid prison.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: This Just In from Baghdad : MGen. Creswell has taken charge. An official of the DoD has died in Iraq; a Marine staff sergeant goes on trial for involuntary manslaughter by culpable negligence; Harm prosecutes, and Mac defends. Officers take partial responsibility.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Fit For Duty : Harm and Mac find themselves on opposing sides when a Navy psychiatrist is charged with allegedly sending a marine diagnosed with combat stress back to battle too soon.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Dream Team : A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Dangerous Game : A deputy sheriff dies while chasing a car carrying two SEALs in a Navy exercise. The driver stands trial for negligent homicide. Bud goes home, the new SecNav takes office, and Harm takes Meredith for a thrilling flight.

programme.title: JAG

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Into the Breach : The NCIS team investigates the murder of a journalist who was writing an exposé on a mishandled classified military operation

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Till Death Do Us Part : After months of planning, the NCIS family celebrates the wedding of Kensi and Deeks; an old acquaintance pays Deeks a surprise visit on his wedding day.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Born To Run : Sydney turns to her sister Nell for help after her high school crush gets mixed up in a Russian plot to steal intelligence from the Department of Defense

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Let Fate Decide : Callen and Sam work with Navy Capt. Harmon Rabb, Jr. to apprehend spies aboard the USS Allegiance.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Decoy : Faced with multiple cases worldwide, the NCIS team splits up, with Callen and Sam working with Mossad Agent Eliana Sapir in Tel Aviv, and Kensi partnering with DOJ Agent Lance Hamilton in Los Angeles.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Hail Mary : Callen and Sam run protection detail for retired Navy Admiral Kilbride in an operation to locate a missing Naval intelligence officer.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Yellow Jack : While Callen and Sam are aboard the USS Allegiance, the ship is placed under quarantine for possible Ebola exposure.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Provenance : The team searches for a stolen painting valued at $40 million after online chatter indicates the artwork is being sold on the black market to fund terrorist activity.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: A Bloody Brilliant Plan : The NCIS team reluctantly aligns with two former criminals from England, Ricky Dorsey and Frankie Bolton, after a powerful arms dealer kidnaps Ricky's daughter in an attempt to obtain a dangerous weapons system.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Concours D'Elegance : The NCIS team links the theft of an undersea drone prototype to a video game streamer’s elaborate party.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Human Resources : After a Navy lieutenant disappears from the scene of a car accident, the NCIS team processes the crime scene and discovers his laptop is missing along with recently accessed confidential information

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Kill Beale Vol. 1 : Callen and Sam travel to San Francisco to search for Beale after he's kidnapped during a clandestine mission for Hetty.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Mother : Akhos Laos, a former black ops agent originally recruited and trained by Hetty Lange, returns to seek revenge on Hetty for the life she introduced him to.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Answers : The team investigates the theft of a computer virus; Callen and Sam consider their future at the agency; Kensi and Deeks discuss having children; Eric and Nell analyze the impact of Eric's undercover assignment on their relationship.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Groundwork : CIA Officer Veronica Stephens asks the team for help when an agricultural engineer Hetty asked her to bring to the United States disappears.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: High Society : After a rise in deaths caused by black market opioid use, the NCIS team links the street drug to funding for terrorist activities.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Commitment Issues : The NCIS team investigates the murder of a Naval warfare engineer at a spoken poetry event; Callen asks Nell to assist him in a worldwide search for Anna's whereabouts.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Circle : Anna Kolcheck returns to warn Callen that he is in danger and he must now work with an archenemy to stop an underground trafficking ring.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Alsiyadun : Agents in Los Angeles' Office of Special Projects team track criminals who threaten national security.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Watch Over Me : An FBI agent is killed while trying to track the location of an undercover agent. Now, NCIS must find the missing agent before the criminals he was investigating do.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: He Ain't Much, But He's Mine : Peggy begins to suspect that Al is cheating because he seems to have a lot of different excuses on why he is coming home later than usual.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Fair Exchange : The Bundys' latest money-making scam is to host a foreign exchange student in their garage. But the French beauty proves to be so popular that she ends up stealing all of Kelly's boyfriends.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Desperately Seeking Miss October : When a Playboy playmate walks into Al's shoe store, he's eager to get home and look up her October 1987 issue. But Al is a broken man when he finds out that Peggy has sold his entire Playboy collection.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: We'll Follow the Sun : The Bundys decide to go for a drive--on Labor Day. They spend the better part of the holiday sitting in traffic, arguing with one another, and picking fights with neighboring motorists.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al…with Kelly : Al and Kelly feign illness to avoid going to Wanker County with Peg and Bud. Al looks forward to his quiet and peaceful weekend until Kelly gets sick.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Sue Casa, His Casa : Bud's new driver's license portends bumper cars on the roadway. When bud t-bones a Mercedes, Al sees an opportunity to clean up in court. At least he has hope. Losing his lawsuit hurt but what he goes through to pay off the settlement is truly painful.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Unnatural : Al is cut from the neighborhood softball team just before the big game. When his all-star replacement is knocked out in the last inning, however, his team and family have to come crawling back.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Dance Show : Peggy goes out dancing with Marcy and becomes taken with a handsome man-about-town named Andy. At home, however, Al gets confronted by Andy's wife, Pete.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Kelly Bounces Back : Now an aspiring model, Kelly invents a maneuver called "The Bundy Bounce" for her first audition as spokesperson for the new Allente car.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Married…with Aliens : After Al returns home from work with a bump on the head, he sees (or thinks he sees) six little green aliens coming down to Earth and stealing his smelly socks to use as fuel for their spaceships.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Wabbit Season : Al decides to grow a vegetable garden but soon faces off against an all-out war with a rabbit who steals his carrots and other vegetables.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Do Ya Think I'm Sexy : When Al moves a sofa off a neighbor's lawn without a shirt on, he unexpectedly gains a reputation as a "stud" among the neighborhood women.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: One Down, Two to Go : Tired of Al escorting her dates out through the doorway, "grown-up" Kelly gets her own apartment.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Peggy Turns 300 : Al tries to ditch Peggy on her birthday until she catches him in the act and tags along with the family.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Peggy Made a Little Lamb : Peggy tries to earn her G.E.D. with Kelly in night school.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Raingirl : Kelly chooses to be a weather girl rather than go to school which makes the Bundy's happy since she'll be making more money than Al.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Agony of De-Feet : After being plagued by nightmares of feet a beautiful woman asks Al to judge a contest at Gary's, whose contestants she, "could never compete with." Meanwhile, Kelly tricks Marcy and Bud into thinking they've slept together.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Yard Sale : Peggy will buy anything at a yard sale, so when she brings home a boar's head, there's no more room in the garage to put it. So, Al decides enough is enough and he decides to have his own yard sale, despite Peggy's protests.

programme.title: Pluto Classic Movie Westerns
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Riders Of The Whistling Pines
programme.desc: Gene Autry believes he has accidentally shot a man, but learns that the guilt lies with men trying to stop a destructive moth infestation. Will modern chemicals be used to save the day, against Gene?

programme.title: A Tale Of Two Guns
programme.desc: In the lawless West, The Cowboys a notorious brotherhood of killers and thieves reigned over the land with brutal fists and fast guns. Fate had finally caught up with them - and now the merciless gang has but a single surviving member.

programme.title: Rovin’ Tumbleweeds
programme.desc: Rancher Autry takes a job singing on the radio to aid farmers whose lands were destroyed by floods. Blaming crooked politicians, he goes to Washington and tries to put through a flood control bill.

programme.title: Public Cowboy No. 1
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Smiley Burnette are back, facing off a new type of criminal who has stolen the latest technologies to outsmart the authorities, including shortwave radios and airplanes!

programme.title: Wild Bill
programme.desc: Wild Bill focuses on the last days of gunfighter, Wild Bill Hickok, consorting in Deadwood with Calamity Jane, observed by a longtime friend, and haunted by the ghosts of his past, from an old flame to a young man who announces his intention to kill Bill.

programme.title: Man With The Gun
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum portrays an Exterminator--in the American West. He will, for a price, eliminate any outlaws annoying the peace of any Western town. When his wife, in disgust, leaves him, he pursues her, only to encounter his greatest gunfighting challenge.

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan
programme.desc: The true story of Irish outlaw Daniel Morgan; who is wanted; dead or alive; in Australia during the 1850s.

programme.title: Bells Of Capistrano
programme.desc: A feud between rodeo companies accelerates when both want Gene Autry, as a crowd-drawing added attraction. This film features Gene singing five hits, including "In Old Capistrano" and "Forgive Me."

programme.title: Navajo Joe
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds, Aldo Sambrell and Fernando Rey star in this lusty, gutsy action western about a fearless Indian with a relentless vendetta against the band of outlaws that killed his people. Directed by Spaghetti Western legend Sergio Corbucci.

programme.title: Blue Canadian Rockies
programme.desc: Gene Autry encounters mayhem on a dude ranch in the heart of timber country. When a Mountie is murdered, Gene and Pat Buttram must find the real culprit and bring peace to the Blue Canadian Rockies.

programme.title: Silver Canyon
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Pat Buttram are sent by the cavalry to bring in raiders who are interfering with supply lines. Gene traces them to a small Army outpost where the outlaws set out to ravage the town.

programme.title: In Old Monterey
programme.desc: Gene Autry tries to persuade farmers to sell their land for a military proving ground. Gene discovers that mine owners are stirring up the ranchers to con the government to pay more for their land.

programme.title: Billy Two Hats
programme.desc: Archie (Gregory Peck) and his partner, Billy (Desi Arnaz, Jr.) are bandits by trade, staging daring robberies throughout the American frontier. But when their latest heist takes a deadly turn, they are pursued by a ruthless marshal (Jack Warden).

programme.desc: Messy Situation, Miscommunication and Academic Probation : When Becky outs her relationship with Professor Davis, it's his erratic behavior that sends Becky down a path to reevaluate their relationship.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Gas Pump, House Dump and Stew Volcano : Darlene searches for a home that she and Becky can afford; after an attempt to boost business at The Lunch Box goes awry.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Big Negotiations and Broken Expectations : Dan enlists the help of a few friends for the funeral-home remodel; Louise points out that Dan's generosity with his time benefits everyone but her.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Adding Insult to Injury : Darlene continues her search for a new job; Becky is desperate to spend more time with Beverly Rose.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Possums, Pregnancy and Patriarchy : Harris makes a big announcement; Ben is overwhelmed with family responsibilities.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Hiding In and Moving Out : Harris takes her anger out on Darlene; Dan and Louise spend an entire day in bed together.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Contra Hearings and the Midnight Gambler : Mark fights for a spot in the Lanford High chamber orchestra; Jackie puts a lottery machine in the Lunch Box.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Road Trip and Guilt Trip : Dan and Jackie take a road trip to a hardware wholesaler in Oklahoma; Darlene heads out of town and leaves behind a plethora of to-do notes for Becky and Ben.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Text Thread and Marrital Bed : Louise gets into a feud with Becky after accidentally sending a rude message in the family text thread; Darlene tries to spice up her sex life with Ben.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: What's So Funny About Peas, Love and Understanding? : Darlene figures out a new plan to afford Mark's college tuition; Jackie and Louise try to help Becky meet a new guy.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dating, Drinking and Grifter Logic : Neville confronts Jackie about loaning Dan money; Darlene attempts to play matchmaker for Mark.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Grad Finale : As Mark's graduation approaches, he considers his relationship with his father; Louise plans a big graduation ceremony at the Lunch Box.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Keep On Truckin' : A sudden turn of events forces the Conners to face the daily struggles of life in Lanford in a way they never have before.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Tangled Up in Blue : Darlene is in for one surprise after another when David introduces his girlfriend, Blue (Juliette Lewis), at a parent-teacher conference and mentions that Mark and Harris will be spending the weekend with them.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: There Won't Be Blood : It's Halloween, the favorite time of year for the Conners, but an email from the school banning certain costumes, including Mark's, sets off an argument between Dan and Darlene. J

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Seperation of Church and Dan : Geena learns that D.J. hasn't been taking Mary to church while she's been away, so insists they go as a family to uphold her traditional values.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Miracles : A family member drops a life-changing announcement; Dan suspects that Becky isn't sticking to her end of the deal about her drinking; Darlene continues her job search; Jackie offers English lessons to a needful La Casita Bonita busboy.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: One Flew Over The Conners' Nest : With Mark and Mary's help, Jackie convinces Dan to build a chicken coop in the backyard so the family can eat organic eggs, but from a bird's-eye view, it appears that she may have ulterior motives.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Hold The Salt : Dan questions Peter's motives when he learns about the pricey Christmas gift Jackie purchased for her new, unemployed beau. Elsewhere, Mark and Mary write up their Christmas wish lists, while Darlene receives advice from an unlikely source.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: O Sister, Where Art Thou? : When Becky helps Harris keep a secret from Darlene, it opens up a can of worms that causes a rift between the two sisters. Jackie supports Peter with his Nordic history project, and Dan reunites with an old friend.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Rage Against the Machine : When Dan gets injured on the job covering D.J.'s vending machine route, the choice to sue the company could lead to D.J. getting fired. Meanwhile, Jackie is appalled when Becky seeks life coaching from her nemesis.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Don't Shoot the Piano Teacher : When Ben offers Mark free piano lessons, Darlene finds this as an opportunity to test his parenting skills. Meanwhile, Jackie throws Becky a baby shower, and Emilio continues his efforts to be part of the baby's life.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: We Contine to Truck : As Darlene grapples with a life-changing offer from Ben, an unexpected conversation with David turns her world even more upside down. Relationship problems lead Jackie to the bottom of the bottle at the last place she remembers being truly happy.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Preemies, Weed and Infidelity : After Emilio's deportation, Jackie takes on a paternal role crafting a birth plan for Becky; Darlene navigates a love triangle with David and Ben; Harris faces her own dilemma.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Kiss Is Just a Kiss : Darlene struggles to decide between David and Ben; Becky begins to doubt herself as a mom; Mark gets in trouble at school when a picture of him and his boyfriend kissing goes viral.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Preemie Monologues : Harris confronts Darlene's lifestyle; Jackie meddles in others' affairs to evade her own issues; Becky struggles with the expenses of parenthood, her family lends support.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Lanford…Lanford : Becky's bartending gig worries Dan; Darlene weighs David versus Ben; Harris' new pal, Odessa, spells trouble.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Nightmare on Lunch Box Street : Jackie's Halloween is a nightmare when she discovers a dark secret; Mary's upset over assumptions about her adoption; Darlene juggles love interests.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Tempest in a Stew Pot : Jackie and Becky pitch their business plan to Darlene in hopes of getting the Lunch Box back, but Darlene's decision leads to hostility among the three.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Slappy Holidays : Thanksgiving chaos erupts as Dan gathers the family; tensions rise over the Lunch Box; Harris surprises everyone with a bold move.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Lanford, Tiolet of Sin : Jackie's decision unites family and community; Becky takes on a late-night job; Darlene goes to extremes to repair her bond with Harris.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Smoking Penguins and Santa on Santa Action : Dan is disappointed when everyone but Becky forgets about his birthday; Darlene faces another issue; Dan excludes Jackie from the family Christmas Santa photo for mistreating Louis.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Throwing a Christian to a Bear : The Conners resist Becky's Packers fan boyfriend; Dan emphasizes family loyalty to the Bears to Mark; Ben and Darlene seek a loan for their magazine.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Mud Turtles, A Good Steak and One Man in a Tub : Becky suspects Jackie's new supplier friend; Darlene's excitement over Harris's college acceptance is challenged by another offer; Dan faces an embarrassing predicament.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Live from Lanford : The Conners debate voting reasons; Louise's offer threatens to take her from Lanford, prompting family intervention in Dan's relationship.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Stolen Stones : Ash and the gang are rescued by a courier service of Arcanine and Growlithe, and in turn must rescue them and their cargo of Fire Stones from the burning ambition of Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Dunsparce Deception : Our heroes find themselves in a village that adores Dunsparce and try to help one unlucky Trainer find one of his own!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Wayward Wobbuffet : The race is on to find Team Rocket’s Wobbuffet when it runs off with the key to an indestructible cage…a cage that holds Ash's Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Around The Whirlpool : In a scuffle with Team Rocket, Ash and friends are thrown from the ship bearing them to the Whirl Islands! Can they escape the powerful whirlpools that threaten to drag them down?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Fly Me To The Moon : The Pidgey on a protected island don’t have to worry about being attacked, so most have lost interest in flying. But one of them still dreams of soaring beyond the stars! Can Ash and friends help?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Takin' It On The Chinchou : Our heroes pass a small mountain village just in time for the annual Chinchou migration. The village always sends Trainers to protect the Chinchou on their journey—but will they be enough to stop Team Rocket?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A Corsola Caper : When a family’s home is threatened by the Corsola who live nearby, it’s Ash and friends to the rescue…and maybe Misty can finally catch that Corsola she’s been after!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Mantine Overboard : After our heroes miss a ferry, they meet a diver who offers to take them to the next island…but they’re soon distracted by tales of treasure aboard a sunken ship!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Octillery The Outcast : When they’re not competing in the Whirl Cup, Ash and Misty try to help a young Trainer whose Octillery has been rejected by its Remoraid friends after evolving.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Dueling Heroes : After winning their preliminary rounds, Ash and Misty face formidable opponents in the Whirl Cup. Meanwhile, the Team Rocket trio have their eyes on stealing the tournament’s prize!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The Perfect Match : It’s the second round of the Whirl Cup, and Ash and Misty have been paired up against each other! Who will come out on top? And will Team Rocket’s plan to distract the police be successful?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Plant It Now .. Diglett Later : Our heroes are asked to help protect a village from marauders who threaten to make off with the Diglett who live there—and thanks to a delicious dinner, Team Rocket offers to help, too!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Hi Ho Silver .. Away : Our heroes meet a jewelry maker who tells them the legend of the fourth Whirl Island…and who soon finds himself embroiled in a Team Rocket plot!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The Mystery Is History : While two sets of Team Rocket villains set out to capture the Legendary Pokémon Lugia, Ash runs into his old friend Richie and his partner, a Pikachu named Sparky!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A Parent Trapped : The little Lugia named Silver has fallen into the hands of Butch and Cassidy of Team Rocket, and with Richie's help, Ash must win the adult Lugia’s trust before it gets caught in the same trap!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A Promise Is A Promise : While trying to rescue the two Lugia from Team Rocket, Ash and friends have been taken prisoner! Now, they must figure out a way to escape…and to free the captured Pokémon as well!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Throwing In The Noctowl : Ash and friends are on a plane back to Olivine City when they get caught in a terrible storm that also sweeps up Team Rocket’s balloon! They’ll have to work together to land safely…but can they manage it?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Nerves Of Steelix : After several interruptions, including yet another Team Rocket scheme, Ash’s battle against Jasmine at the Olivine Gym is finally getting under way!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Bulbasaur … The Ambassador : When the Pokémon at Professor Oak's lab in Kanto have a hard time getting along, the professor asks Ash to send his Bulbasaur to the lab so it can help keep the peace.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Espeon, Not Included : In Ecruteak City, our heroes meet up with their friend Sakura and her newly evolved Espeon. Sakura and her sisters are preparing for a dance competition, but Team Rocket is lurking in the wings, hoping to steal their Pokémon…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: For Ho-Oh The Bells Toll : When our heroes investigate a sudden pealing of bells, they discover that the Crystal Bells, which are said to ring only when the Legendary Pokémon Ho-Oh returns, are missing! The researcher Eusine seems to know something…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Extreme Pokémon : When Ash runs into his old rival Gary preparing to enter his Arcanine in a race, he decides to compete as well! But first, he’ll have to chase Team Rocket away from the Pokémon Day Care.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: An Egg-Sighting Adventure : When the Pokémon Egg given to Ash goes missing, our heroes call on the help of a hapless Officer Jenny. It isn't long before they realize that if they want the Egg back, they'll have to find it themselves!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Hatching A Plan : The moment has finally come: a Phanpy has hatched from Ash's Pokémon Egg! The little Pokémon is full of energy and soon charging off...with our heroes and Team Rocket in tow!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Dues And Don'ts : Jessie, James, and Meowth take time to lick their wounds and dream of stealing Pikachu for the glory of Team Rocket. After a chance meeting with a Team Rocket scout, it seems these dreams are blasting off before their eyes!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Just Waiting On A Friend : When thick fog interrupts our heroes' journey, a girl and her Ninetales invite them to rest at a nearby mansion...where Brock and their host fall into a romance that could turn out to be ghostly!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A Tyrogue Full Of Trouble : Near Mt. Mortar, our heroes run into a Trainer who is trying to curb a Tyrogue's wild ways. But when Team Rocket gets involved, will they be able to save the troublesome Tyrogue from the villains' clutches?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Xatu The Future : Our heroes meet a young girl watching over a group of Xatu, whose psychic powers let them predict the future of a local village. When the villagers begin doubting their warnings, can the Xatu prove the truth of their visions?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Talkin' 'Bout An Evolution : Reaching the Lake of Rage, Pikachu and Togepi begin to feel sick, and our heroes are attacked by an enraged red Gyarados. When Team Rocket appears on the scene, things look a lot more dangerous for Ash and friends…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The Rage Of Innocence : Things look bad for our heroes, who have been captured by Team Rocket at the Lake of Rage. With the fate of the world's Pokémon at stake, can Ash rise to the occasion and save the day?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: As Cold As Pryce : Finally reaching Mahogany Town, Ash is warming up for his next Gym battle. But after getting the cold shoulder from Gym Leader Pryce, can our hero convince his frosty opponent to give him a chance?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Nice Pryce, Baby : Pryce and Ash are about to clash in a cold contest in the Mahogany Town Gym. Will Ash be able to show what he and his Pokémon are made of and earn his seventh Johto region Gym badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Whichever Way The Wind Blows : Our heroes encounter battling groups of Bellossom and Vileplume, who have only recently evolved. As each group fights with increasing number and intensity, can our heroes put an end to the quarrelling?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Some Like It Hot : The heat is rising in our heroes' journey when Misty and her Water-type Pokémon go head to head with a willful Fire-type Trainer!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Hocus Pokémon : Ash and the gang bump into a Pokémon magician, and soon they're on the hunt to find components for her greatest spell yet!

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Nothing's Working : A woman complaining of abdominal pain finds out that she's actually pregnant - but is she ready to be a mother?

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: We Need Further Tests : It's a busy day in the ER as Dr. Heilbron battles to treat a man whose intestine has come out, as well as car crash and gun victims.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Pressure Is Building : There's havoc in the ER again when a boy is rushed in after breathing in an unspecified poisonous chemical. Has it permanently damaged his lungs?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Patriotic Chopper : The team is commissioned to build a bike for a military veteran. He wants to show his love for family and country by covering the bike with American flags and portraits of loved ones who also served.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Tommy Lee's Chopper : When Tommy Lee's beloved bike gets crushed in an accident, he turns to the only person he trusts to fix it--the guys who built it--Count's Kustoms.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The Fast and the Ridiculous : Ryan, Mike and Shannon convince Danny to sponsor them in a 24-hour junk car endurance race. Meanwhile Danny has the guys work on a one of a kind special shop project as payback for his sponsorship.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The Fast and the Ridiculous, Part 2 : The guys finally find a not so perfect car for the junk car race which they resurrect as the "Count's Bloody Mess." At the race, they realize first place may not be an option, but hope that "Count's Bloody Mess" will finish in one piece.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Dee's Sweet Ride : Twisted Sister's Dee Snider brings the crew a brand new BMW Z4 that he wants Count-ified for his wife Suzette as an anniversary present. A simple paint job turns disaster when Suzette is not happy with the final look, not once, but twice.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: CHiPs Bike : Kevin's brother Steve wants a 1980 Kawasaki KZ100 motorcycle tricked out just like the ones on the classic TV series, CHiPs.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The Amazing Z : Ryan and Kevin find a 1972 Datsun 240z that Danny agrees to flip. But when he has a last-minute change of heart, Ryan must figure out how to make Danny's vision a reality without derailing the project.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Get Your Motor Running : Danny and Shannon are in motorcycle heaven when they are asked to restore a rare 1957 Harley Davidson Pan head prototype that has spent the last 20 years in their client's living room.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Storm Chaser : The local Fox News channel wants to update their Ford Expedition Storm Chaser in a mobile news unit with an elaborate paint scheme that they can also bring to schools to help kids learn about weather.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Bonneville Bound Part 1 : After the vehicle that holds a land speed record is seriously damaged and repaired, the guys give it a sleek look. Then, the crew heads to Bonneville, UT to watch the Turbinator go for the record again.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Bonneville Bound Part 2 : Ryan and Kevin head to the Bonneville Salt Flats to see The Turbinator, a vehicle that holds a land speed record try to break 500 MPH.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Decades To Drive : Dave traded for his dream 1957 Corvette more than three decades ago, but his plans to build it have so far come to nothing. Ken chose a rare 1954 Kaiser Darrin from his father’s collection and its now on FantomWorks to reverse the hands of time.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: One For Ole Miss : Sean asks Dan to find a 1969 Camaro that can be built into the custom restomod of his dreams. Jeff wants to give his 1969 Cutlass a rare Hurst makeover, but the engine has never run and there are more parts in boxes than on the car.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Legacy : Tom asks Dan to find him a rare 1967 Camaro Convertible with factory AC. But when Dan finds the Unicorn, the car is too good to cut up. Dave wants Dan to build a safe, all stock 1971 Datsun, but the car has been badly damaged by previous restoration work.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Beetle Juiced : David is a Volkswagen fanatic who wants a 1967 Beetle that can outmatch muscle cars. Robert wants a widened 1967 Corvette supercar, but first FantomWorks have to undo the bad repairs from at least three fiberglass rending accidents.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: One Mad Mustang Part-1/2 : Arthur bought his Cyclone new in 1967. Then, his father put 400,000 miles on it. Now, he wants FantomWorks to make it better than new. Antonio and his cousin Andres challenge Dan to build the fastest Mustang CS in Mexico.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: One Mad Mustang Part-2/2 : FantomWorks finish the build of the ultimate Mustang Sleeper, a California Special powered by a Coyote Aluminator. Phil wants a 1949 Chevy Pick-up, but the truck is a disassembled jigsaw puzzle with a lot of pieces missing.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Against the Grain : Chris asks FantomWorks to breathe new life into a 1951 Mercury Woody that was sitting in a chicken coop for thirty years. Dan’s 1970 Mustang Boss arrives with a long list of problems and the speed of a sea slug.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Elephant In The Room : Kolin asks Dan to repair his smashed up 1973 Corvette, but Dan finds major problems that existed before the accident. Jim wants Dan to build him an asphalt crushing 1970 Challenger convertible by adding a 426 Hemi with all the fixin’s.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Bow Tie ‘til I Die : Jay brings Dan a 2012 Camaro ZL1 with poor performance and a blown supercharger. Terry wants Dan to complete a high-powered restomod of a 1931 Landau Phaeton, but the car arrives with mismatched parts and an engine that should have stayed in the junkyard.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Flatheads Forever : Arnold brings Dan two interlocking projects. He wants FantomWorks to transform his 1946 Ford Panel Wagon into a classic tour-mobile, and he also wants Dan to fix the 1941 Harley Flathead motorcycle that will ride in the back.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Exorcism In The ER : A man goes into anaphylactic shock; a tough guy fears needles; a man stabs himself with a ninja sword; a patient believes she needs an exorcism.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Vietnamese Cuisine : Martha creates an incredible Vietnamese feast with her friend Monica Tran, including lettuce-wrapped golden fried spring rolls, traditional pho soup, and savory sizzling pancakes.

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: The World of Succulents : Martha explores how to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse; Seed Starting : Martha takes us inside her vegetable greenhouse to see how she has turned her harvest into a year-round bounty; she collects, stores, and sows seeds, and makes her perfect green drink.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: The Incredible World of Orchids : Martha visits the incredible Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden; this year's show immerses you in a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Hens and Chicks : Now with over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her vast knowledge about raising and caring for her flock; learn the how-tos of building a coop.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Japanese Cuisine: Sushi, Sashimi and More : Martha visits the Japanese restaurant Joji in the heart of New York, where Chef George Ruan shares his secrets for the ultimate omakase experience; culinary giant Daniel Boulud stops by.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Brunch Favorites : Martha starts off brunch with a citrus cocktail Mary's knees; Chef Ignacio Mattos joins and makes an omelette with caviar and creme fraiche; Martha makes an endive salad; Martha makes waffles.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread : Martha journeys through her local area in search of the ultimate fresh-baked croissants and sourdough bread; learning about homemade bread and pastries.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver : Martha is in the test kitchen with English chef, restaurateur, and author Jamie Oliver, and they're cooking up a mouth-watering menu of dishes that are easy to make.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha Throws a Tea Party : Martha and her niece Sophie visit their favorite tea shop, Arogya, in Westport, Conn., to discover the do's and don'ts of making tea; they return to Martha's kitchen to create dishes with tea.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha and the Chocolate Factory : Martha visits Mast Market in Mt. Kisco, N.Y., and learns the art behind making their renowned chocolate; from roasting cacao, to stone grinding, to forming delicious bars and chips.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday : Hannah Heimbuch and Martha demonstrate how to prepare fish for cooking; Chef Marcus Samuelsson makes cured king salmon and halibut en papillote; Martha breaks down a Dungeness crab.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Grilled Favorites : Fish in banana leaves; date-glazed lamb chops; sea bass fillets with okra kebabs; spatchcocked saffron chicken.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Stews of the Arabian Gulf : Arabian Gulf pot pie; braised lamb shanks with okra; curried swordfish stew; red lentil vegetable stew.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Breads : Date flatbreads; flatout bread with seeds and raisin; coconut mandazi; eggplant flatbread.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Side Dishes : Creamed coconut spinach; eggplant with herbs and yogurt; cauliflower salad with roasted chickpeas; za'atar smashed potatoes.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Entertaining for a Crowd : Chicken kabsa; stuffed cabbage and spiced lamb chops; orzo risotto with wild mushrooms; a sweet cake called kumajj.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Dates : Chicken machbous; mansaf; beef biryani; lamb ghouzi.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Coastal Favorites : Recipes featuring the bounty of the Arabian Gulf include crab croquettes, date pancakes, lamb dumplings and fava bean dip.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking With Grains : Kamut and roasted vegetables; mixed grain pilaf with chicken; herbed barley salad with dates.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Vegetables : Simple vegetable side dishes include steamed spinach, sauteed broccoli rabe, roasted cauliflower steaks, brown sugar-glazed carrots, sauteed sugar snap peas and shelled peas with mint and lemony kale salad.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Steaming : Cooking chicken breasts in parchment paper; cleaning and steaming mussels; using a bamboo steamer to prepare steamed salmon and peas.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Roasting : Roast chicken; roasted root vegetable salad; green peppercorn-crusted roast tenderloin of beef.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden : Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kikyo, Captured by Naraku : Inuyasha and the gang go to save Kikyo. They are struck with Death by Illusion, a demon technique.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Tetsusaiga and Tenseiga : The Tenseiga and the Tetsusaiga, two great swords that were forged by swordsmith Totosai, have been left to Sesshomaru and Inuyasha by their father.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The True Owner of the Great Sword! : Inuyasha's eye is closed by poison from Sesshomaru's claws. He relies on the smell of demon energies clashing to find the wind scar.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kohaku’s Lost Memory : Sango finds the bodies of her father and the other slayers at the ruins of Naraku's castle.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: That Unforgettable Face! : Sango's brother Kohaku is being manipulated by Naraku and is after Kagome's life.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha’s Soul, Devoured : Inuyasha and the gang overcome Naraku's trap involving Kohaku.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Demon’s True Nature : Inuyasha transforms into a demon when his life is in danger. He quickly destroys Gatenmaru, who has become a giant moth.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Father’s Old Enemy: Ryukotsusei : Inuyasha visits Totosai's workplace by himself. The Tetsusaiga was broken by Goshinki, and Inuyasha's own fang was used to repair it.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Backlash Wave: Tetsusaiga’s Ultimate Technique : Ryukotsusei knocks away the Tetsusaiga, and Inuyasha transforms into a demon.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Stone Flower and Shippo's First Love : In a certain village, Shippo meets a girl named Satsuki. Satsuki believes that her brother, who went to war, will come back.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Temptress in the Mist : Husbands are being lured away from their village by a beautiful demon. Their wives ask Miroku to defeat the demon.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Fateful Night in Togenkyo, Part 1 : Sango goes back to the slayer village in order to fix her Hiraikotsu, and Kagome goes back to the well so she can return to the present day.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Fateful Night in Togenkyo, Part 2 : Inuyasha is able to escape from the miniature garden with the help of Miroku and the others, and goes to save Kagome.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Beautiful Sister Apprentices : Sango returns to the demon slayer village and repairs her Hiraikotsu. She also lays her father and her comrades' ashes to rest.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The 50 Year-old Curse of the Dark Priestess : Naraku calls upon a priestess named Tsubaki. Fifty years ago, Tsubaki was defeated by Kikyo when she went after the Shikon Jewel.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kikyo and the Dark Priestess : Kagome desperately fights the curse placed on her by Tsubaki, a dark priestess. Meanwhile, Kikyo appears before Tsubaki.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Tsubaki's Unrelenting Evil Spell : Tsubaki's curse steals Kagome's consciousness. Kagome forgets feudal Japan in an illusory world.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Red and White Priestesses : Tsubaki visits the onmyoji mansion where she once trained.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Giant Ogre of the Forbidden Tower : Tsubaki is a priestess who was considered to be on par with Kikyo.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Farewell Days of My Youth : One night, someone possesses Sango to attack Miroku. The group examines the centipede demon that they suspect was behind it, but they are mistaken.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Naraku's Barrier - Kagura's Decision : There is a rift in Naraku's barrier. But it's the beginning of the month, and when night falls, Inuyasha loses his demon powers.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Howling Wind of Betrayal : Kagura approaches Sesshomaru and tells him to kill Naraku, but Sesshomaru refuses.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Shippo Gets an Angry Challenge : Shippo is sent a letter challenging him to a battle. The letter's sender is Soten Raijyu, and he is still just a child.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Terror of the Faceless Man : A demon born from a piece of flesh that Naraku discarded transforms into a man without a face and steals the handsome face of Muso, a traveling monk.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Onigumo's Memory Restored : Muso attacks Kagome. Inuyasha destroys him with his Wind Scar. Naraku, who was watching the event, tells Kagura to tell Inuyasha where Muso went.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Three-Sided Battle to the Death : Muso regenerates even thought he was hit with the Wind Scar. Miroku tells Inuyasha that Muso has a heart in the area where he has a spider marking.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Totosai's Rigid Training : Inuyasha visits Totosai in search of a technique that can break through Naraku's barrier. There he meets Bunza, a wildcat-demon child.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Israel : Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Copenhagen : Tony explores Copenhagen, the economic and cultural center of Denmark.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Sicily : Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Salvador, Brazil : Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Mississippi Delta : Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Russia : Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Thailand : Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Shanghai : Anthony Bourdain explores the vibrant, dynamic city of Shanghai.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Zanzibar : In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The Chaco : A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Massachusetts : This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Shanghai : Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The Bronx : The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Iran : Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Jamaica : In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Scotland : In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: South Korea : After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Miami : In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Madagascar : In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Budapest : For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.desc: Jamie Morgan, who was born with a heart-shaped birthmark on his face, discovers demons on the streets of East London.

programme.title: Terminal

programme.title: Good People

programme.title: Yes, God, Yes
