programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Endgame : The Stargate is missing. Upon investigation the team notice a scientist tagging the stargate with a locator beacon. It looks like this is the work of The Trust taking whatever ruthless action they deem necessary to protect Earth from alien invaders.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Gemini : An old IDC comes through; Send M.A.L.P. The M.A.L.P. telemetry shows that the person sending the transmission is Carter but Carter is in the control room at SGC. The Carter on the other side explains that she is a Replicator.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Prometheus Unbound : A mission has been greenlit to take the Prometheus to the Pegasus galaxy. Jackson wants in. O'Neill feels he is too valuable to risk. The decision is overridden by the mission commander, none other than Gen. Hammond, now head of home world security.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Reckoning (Part 1) : Teal'c and Bra'tac believe the time is right to lead their people in an uprising against the Goa'uld. Their plan suffers a setback when an army of Replicators begins to systematically take control of Goa'uld ships and Jackson is taken prisoner.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Reckoning (Part 2) : Hidden in the ruined temple on Dakara is an Ancient weapon powerful enough to destroy the Replicators. Thanks to a timely warning, the team knows it. And thanks to Daniel's repressed Ancient knowledge, Replicator Carter knows it as well.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Threads : With a climactic battle behind them, the team turns towards personal matters. Unbeknownst to them, Anubis prepares one final attempt! Meanwhile, Jackson awakens in a way station between the living world and the world of beings that have ascended.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Hope : While connected to the stones in an attempt to contact Homeworld Command, Chloe wakes up with Ginn’s consciousness. Eli must find a way to protect Chloe without losing Ginn. Meanwhile, Volker requires a difficult operation to save his life.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Seizure : Homeworld Command tries to convince an ally they suspect might be infiltrated by the Lucian Alliance to let them use their planet to power up and dial Destiny. Meanwhile, Rush is trapped in a simulation created by Amanda Perry.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: The Hunt : While exploring a planet, the team is attacked and members are taken captive by an alien creature. The team must turn to Varro and his Lucian team for help. Meanwhile, on Destiny, Eli and Brody mistakenly trap Brody in a cryogenic device.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Common Descent : Destiny discovers the survivors of an interplanetary expedition who claim their civilization, Novus, was founded two thousand years earlier by Destiny’s crew. Suddenly, they are attacked by the Drones who have discovered a way to track Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Full Alert : When O'Neill finds the door to his home forced open and former Vice President Kinsey waiting for him inside, his first instinct is to call the police. But he allies himself with Kinsey when he learns of a rogue organization known as The Trust.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Citizen Joe : At a tag sale, civilian Joe Spencer comes across a small stone that gives him visions of SG-1 in action. Delighted, he shares the stories with anyone who will listen. But when he learns that SG-1 really exists, his excitement turns into obsession.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: Alliances : Greer and Wray find themselves trapped in the midst of an attack when an alien ship carrying a radioactive bomb crashes into Homeworld Command. Meanwhile, Rush (Robert Carlyle) discovers that not everyone wants Greer and Wray back aboard Destiny.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Capitalism : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate the murder of a prominent and well-respected Cambodian immigrant lawyer and discover his business might not be as it appears. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Extradition : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are sent to Los Angeles to extradite an old 'perp' as Cagney meets her brother Brian's (guest star David Ackroyd) family for the first time in 12 years. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: A Safe Place : When a vial of plutonium is stolen from a scientist, Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) run up against government barriers trying to locate the lethal radioactive material before the thief becomes terminally ill.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Disenfranchised : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate a child-abuse case involving a father and his two young daughters after the oldest comes forward. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels and Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Role Call : Cagney (Sharon Gless) resents the presence of a glamorous Hollywood starlet who stars in a popular television detective show and has asked to shadow Cagney and Lacey (Tyne Daly). Until Lacey points out just how alike the two women really are.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: The Zealot : When the prosecuting attorney in a child-pornography case is found murdered, Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) only suspect is the lawyer's final appointment -- a teenage prostitute. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Marathon : A white South African runner will let nothing stop her from finishing the New York City Marathon, even a death threat against her own child. Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are charged with her protection. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Rites Of Passage : While investigating a suspicious death at a sorority house, Cagney and Lacey are confounded by some very perplexing aspects of the sexual revolution. Their investigation soon becomes stalled by the sorority sisters who hope to protect each other.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Revenge : Detective Mark Petrie (Carl Lumbly) believes a suspect facing an assault and battery charge may have raped and murdered his sister 14 years earlier. But things go wrong for the detective when the suspect is murdered. Sharon Gless and Tyne Daly star.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: The Rapist (Part 2) : Cagney (Sharon Gless) is placed in a compromising situation when a former partner, Sara Jones (guest star Julie Fulton), charged with murdering a suspected rapist, seeks her perjured testimony. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Cost Of Living : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) finally have their day in court with an old foe (guest star John Harkins), as Charlie (guest star Dick O'Neill) begins drinking again. Meanwhile Mary Beth is haunted by a violent criminal from the past.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Waste Deep : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate an illegal toxic-waste dumping incident at the behest of an environmental activist (guest star Didi Conn). Mary Beth has another cancer scare. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Ahead Of The Game : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) suspect foul play when a basketball player's mysterious death reveals drug abuse of a surprising nature. After the Lacey home is ransacked, Mary Beth tries to track down a family heirloom that was taken.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Favors : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) investigation of a sleazy loan shark brings charges of corruption and favoritism upon a judge (guest star Robert Cornthwaite) who is friends with Charlie Cagney (guest star Dick O'Neill).

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Easy Does It : While assisting Lacey (Tyne Daly) in a stakeout at an Alcoholics Anonymous meeting center, Cagney (Sharon Gless) begins to realize the full impact of Charlie's (guest star Dick O'Neill) alcoholism and her own heavy drinking. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: To Sir With Love : The 14th Precinct becomes a three-ring circus as Cagney (Sharon Gless) plans the annual division dinner honoring Lt. Samuels (Al Waxman). Lacey (Tyne Daly) prepares for Alice Christine's first birthday. Also starring Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Divine Couriers : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate a 'travel agent' (guest star Lois Nettleton) who claims to be able to get messages to those who have passed on, by sending them along with the terminally ill. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: ...Right To Remain Silent : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) investigation of a deaf teenage fugitive is compromised by their compassion towards her handicap. Meanwhile, David Keeler (guest star Stephen Macht) asks Cagney for forgiveness. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.desc: A Knight to Remember : Two robberies take place on stagecoaches that Adam is traveling on, and both times a knight in shining armor scares the robbers away. Adam is accused of robbery, and his story about the knight is none too helpful.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Flapjack Contest : Hoss unknowingly enters a flapjack contest and Joe puts Hoss on a diet which Hoss doesn't care for. Joe's betting on the flapjack contest could get him into some trouble and will he ever succeed in getting the window pane his Pa wants?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Wild One : Lafe Jessup doesn't really want to be married, and now he's about to be a father! The horse wrangler finds a fight with Hoss at his reluctance to perform his duties.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Saga of Squaw Charlie : A peaceful Indian is framed for the kidnapping of a young girl, a stunt which ends of tragedy.

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Ponderosa Birdman : Professor Klump and Amanda pull Hoss into their flying machine scheme. The ""Hoss-mobile""doesn't seem to be destined for a great take-off.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Ballerina : Kellie Conrad dances and her father plays the fiddle to earn a living. Hoss feels a sense of guilt after he unintentionally hurts the arm that Kellie's father uses to play the fiddle, in a saloon fight with some roughnecks.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Once a Doctor : Hoss' latest acquaintance, an Englishman named Professor Poppy, is actually Percival Alexander Mundy, M.D., who has given up the practice of medicine. However, when Hoss is shot in the back, only Mundy's skill can save his life.
